TEXT.English: This is a warmonger's trait. You get a free promotion for most of your units (the best units in the game, really--melee and gunpowder) and cheap barracks and drydocks to provide additional promotions. If you don't go to war when you're Aggressive, you're wasting the trait.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]Bronze Working[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_IRON_WORKING]Iron Working[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CIVIL_SERVICE]Civil Service[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MACHINERY]Machinery[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_GUNPOWDER]Gunpowder[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CHEMISTRY]Chemistry[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_RIFLING]Rifling[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_STEEL]Steel[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]Assembly Line[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HEROIC_EPIC]Heroic Epic[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MA_WEST_POINT]West Point[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_RED_CROSS]Red Cross[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_PENTAGON]The Pentagon[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_STATUE_OF_ZEUS]Statue of Zeus[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BARRACKS]Barracks[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_DRYDOCK]Drydock[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STABLE]Stable[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Civics[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_VASSALAGE]Vassalage[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_THEOCRACY]Theocracy[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]How to use this trait? War. Duh. Am I not making myself clear, here? Put together a horde and go kill somebody already.[NEWLINE]You'll want your forces to mostly be composed of units that benefit from the trait: Melee units (Warriors, Axemen, Swordsmen, Spearmen, Macemen, Pikemen), Gunpowder units (Musketmen, Riflemen, Grenadiers, Infantry, SAM Infantry, Marines, Mechanized Infantry) and their UU variants.[NEWLINE]Drydocks make Steel a priority technology; likewise with technologies that enable one of the aforementioned units. Note that some of the Aggressive leaders have a UU that benefit from the trait (Montezuma, Alexander, Tokugawa, Ragnar, Shaka) and some do not (Genghis, Kublai, Stalin). The latter do benefit from the cheap barracks, however. Also, remember that you'll need more units than just melee and gunpowder--siege weapons and mounted may not receive Aggressive's free Combat I, but they're still essential.[NEWLINE]The Statue of Zeus world wonder is very good to have--mainly so that someone you're attacking doesn't have it. War weariness is bad enough as it is; having it doubled will definitely put a crimp in your world domination plans.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Aggressive in and of itself has no economic advantages and may, in fact, over-encourage you to accrue too many economic liabilities. Every unit has a maintenance cost, remember, and that cost goes up when the unit leaves home turf. In addition, every conquered city has maintenance costs. Over-conquering, especially early in the game, can be just as bad as over-expanding.[NEWLINE]On the plus side, since Aggressive should mean you have better units, hopefully you'll need fewer of them.
TEXT.German: Dies ist eine Eigenschaft f眉r Kriegstreiber. Viele der eigenen Einheiten (tats盲chlich die besten Einheiten des Spiels: Nahkampf und Schie脽pulver) erhalten eine Extra-Bef枚rderung und verbilligte Kasernen und Trockendocks sorgen f眉r zus盲tzliche Bef枚rderungen. Falls diese Eigenschaft nicht zum F眉hren von Kriegen verwendet wird, ist sie eigentlich komplett verschwendet.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Wichtige Technologien[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]Bronzeverarbeitung[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_IRON_WORKING]Eisenverarbeitung[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CIVIL_SERVICE]脰ffentliche Verwaltung[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MACHINERY]Maschinen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_GUNPOWDER]Schie脽pulver[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CHEMISTRY]Chemie[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_RIFLING]Drall[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_STEEL]Stahl[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]Flie脽band[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Wunder[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HEROIC_EPIC]Heldenepos[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MA_WEST_POINT]West Point[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_RED_CROSS]Rotes Kreuz[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_PENTAGON]Pentagon[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_STATUE_OF_ZEUS]Zeus-Statue[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Bevorzugte Geb盲ude[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BARRACKS]Kaserne[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_DRYDOCK]Trockendock[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STABLE]Stallungen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Gesellschaftsformen[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_VASSALAGE]Vasallentum[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_THEOCRACY]Theokratie[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Einsatzm枚glichkeiten[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Wie diese Eigenschaft eingesetzt werden soll? Im Krieg, nat眉rlich. Immer noch nicht deutlich genug? Eine Horde Einheiten dazu benutzen, um andere Einheiten auszul枚schen.[NEWLINE]Die eigenen Streitkr盲fte sollten am besten aus Einheiten zusammengesetzt sein, die von der Eigenschaft profitieren: Nahkampfeinheiten (Krieger, Axtk盲mpfer, Schwertk盲mpfer, Speerk盲mpfer, Streitkolbentr盲ger, Pikeniere), Schie脽pulvereinheiten (Musketiere, Sch眉tzen, Grenadiere, Infanterie, SAM Infanterie, Marines, Mechanisierte Infanterie) und die Spezialeinheiten, die sie jeweils ersetzen.[NEWLINE]Die Technologie Stahl sollte vordringlich erforscht werden, um Trockendocks errichten zu k枚nnen; ebenso verh盲lt es sich mit Technologien, die Voraussetzung f眉r die oben genannten Einheiten sind. Es sollte beachtet werden, dass einige der "aggressiven" Oberh盲upter 眉ber eine Spezialeinheit verf眉gen, die von der Eigenschaft profitiert (Montezuma, Alexander, Tokugawa, Ragnar, Shaka), w盲hrend bei anderen dies nicht der Fall ist (Dschingis Khan, Kublai Khan, Stalin). Trotzdem k枚nnen die letztgenannten nat眉rlich Nutzen aus den verbilligten Kasernen ziehen. Au脽erdem sollte nicht vergessen werden, dass f眉r einen Krieg mehr als nur Nahkampf- und Schie脽pulvereinheiten ben枚tigt werden - Belagerungswaffen und Berittene Einheiten erhalten vielleicht nicht die Extra-Bef枚rderung "Kampf I", sind aber trotzdem unverzichtbar.[NEWLINE]Das Weltwunder "Zeus-Statue" ist eine sch枚ne Erg盲nzung f眉r die eigene Zivilisation - haupts盲chlich deswegen, damit niemand anderes es errichten kann. Kriegsunzufriedenheit ist schon schlimm genug; wenn sie sich aber verdoppelt, hat das desastr枚se Auswirkungen auf die eigenen Welteroberungspl盲ne.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Nachteile[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Die Eigenschaft "Aggressiv" selbst bietet keine wirtschaftlichen Vorteile und k枚nnte den Anreiz zu einem enormen Anwachsen der Kosten liefern. Schlie脽lich verursacht jede Einheit laufende Kosten und diese Kosten erh枚hen sich, wenn die Einheit das eigene Hoheitsgebiet verl盲sst. Zus盲tzlich verursacht auch jede eroberte Stadt laufende Kosten. 脺bertriebene Eroberungen, speziell in der Fr眉hphase einer Partie, k枚nnen ebenso t枚dlich sein, wie 眉bertriebene Expansion.[NEWLINE]Andererseits: Da "Aggressiv" meist auch bessere Einheiten bedeuten sollte, werden hoffentlich auch weniger von ihnen ben枚tigt.
TEXT.Polish: To jest cecha Agresywny. Otrzymujesz darmow¹ promocjê do wiêkszoœci Twoich jednostek oraz tañsze baraki wraz z stoczni¹. TEXT.English: Way of the Centaur Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Mounted Units gain the Way of the Centaur promotion, giving them +1 Strength. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie du Centaure est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s Mont茅es gagnent la promotion Voie du Centaure, leur donnant +1 de Force. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec la Technologie du Mode de vie Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 袩褍褌褜 袣械薪褌邪胁褉邪 写芯褋褌褍锌械薪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 褋 效褍写械褋邪屑懈 谐褉褍锌锌褘 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 袣芯薪薪褘械 袨褌褉褟写褘 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯胁褘褕械薪懈械 锌芯 锌褍褌懈 芦袣械薪褌邪胁褉禄, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 小懈谢褍. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.

TEXT.English: Way of the Feather Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Archery Units gain the Way of the Feather promotion, giving them +1 Strength. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie de la Plume est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s d'Archerie gagnent la promotion Voie de la Plume, leur donnant +1 de Force. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec la Technologie du Mode de vie Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌懈 袩械褉邪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 谐褉褍锌锌械 褔褍写械褋 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 芯褌褉褟写褘 褋褌褉械谢褜斜褘 懈蟹 谢褍泻邪 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯胁褘褕械薪懈械 锌芯 袩褍褌懈 袩械褉邪, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 小懈谢械. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 泻褍谢邪泻邪

TEXT.English: Way of the Fist Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Law Enforcements Units gain the Way of the Fist promotion, giving them an additional 1.5% Investigation (To find local criminals), -4 Crime Turn/City and -2 Crime Turn/Plot. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie du Poing est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s d'Application de la Loi gagnent la promotion Voie du Poing, leur donnant 1,5% d'Investigation suppl茅mentaire (pour trouver des criminels locaux), -4 Crime Tour/Ville et -2 Crime Tour/Parcelle. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec la Technologie du Mode de vie Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌褜 泻褍谢邪泻邪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 写谢褟 谐褉褍锌锌褘 芦袛褉械胁薪懈械 锌褍褌懈禄. 袙褋械 锌芯写褉邪蟹写械谢械薪懈褟 锌褉邪胁芯芯褏褉邪薪懈褌械谢褜薪褘褏 芯褉谐邪薪芯胁 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌褉芯写胁懈卸械薪懈械 芦袩褍褌褜 泻褍谢邪泻邪禄, 褔褌芯 写邪械褌 懈屑 写芯锌芯谢薪懈褌械谢褜薪芯 1,5% 褉邪褋褋谢械写芯胁邪薪懈褟 (写谢褟 锌芯懈褋泻邪 屑械褋褌薪褘褏 锌褉械褋褌褍锌薪懈泻芯胁), -4 芯褌 锌褉械褋褌褍锌薪芯褋褌懈/胁 谐芯褉芯写械 懈 -2 芯褌 锌褉械褋褌褍锌薪芯褋褌懈/ 薪邪 屑械褋褌薪芯褋褌懈. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 锌懈褟胁泻懈

TEXT.English: Way of the Leech Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Health Care Units gain the Way of the Leech promotion, giving them Units heal in Same tile Extra 8% Damage/turn, -4 Disease Turn/City and -2 Disease Turn/Plot. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie de la Sangsue est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s de Soins de Sant茅 gagnent la promotion Voie de la Sangsue, leur donnant la capacit茅 de gu茅rir les Unit茅s sur la m锚me case avec 8% de D茅g芒ts/tour suppl茅mentaires, -4 Maladie Tour/Ville et -2 Maladie Tour/Parcelle. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec l'猫re Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 袣邪褔械褋褌胁芯 芦袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 锌懈褟胁泻懈禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪芯 褌芯谢褜泻芯 褋 褔褍写械褋邪屑懈 谐褉褍锌锌褘 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 锌芯写褉邪蟹写械谢械薪懈褟 蟹写褉邪胁芯芯褏褉邪薪械薪懈褟 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯芯褖褉械薪懈械 芦袩褍褌褜 锌懈褟胁泻懈禄, 褔褌芯 写邪械褌 懈屑 胁芯蟹屑芯卸薪芯褋褌褜 谢械褔懈褌褜 芯褌褉褟写褘 胁 芯写薪芯泄 懈 褌芯泄 卸械 锌谢懈褌泻械, 写芯锌芯谢薪懈褌械谢褜薪芯 8% 褍褉芯薪邪/蟹邪 褏芯写, -4 褏芯写邪 芯褌 蟹邪斜芯谢械胁邪械屑芯褋褌懈/胁 谐芯褉芯写械 懈 -2 褏芯写邪 芯褌 蟹邪斜芯谢械胁邪械屑芯褋褌懈/薪邪 屑械褋褌薪芯褋褌懈. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 褌械薪械泄

TEXT.English: Way of the Shadows Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Criminal, Ruffian and Strike Team Units gain the Way of the Shadows promotion, giving them +1 Strength. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie des Ombres est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s Criminelles, Voyous et 脡quipes d'Assaut gagnent la promotion Voie des Ombres, leur donnant +1 de Force. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec la Technologie du Mode de vie Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌褜 褌械薪械泄禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 谐褉褍锌锌械 褔褍写械褋 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 泻褉懈屑懈薪邪谢褜薪褘械, 褉械泄写械褉褋泻懈械 懈 邪褌邪泻褍褞褖懈械 泻芯屑邪薪写薪褘械 褞薪懈褌褘 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯胁褘褕械薪懈械 锌芯 褋锌芯褋芯斜褍 芦袩褍褌褜 褌械薪械泄禄, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 泻 褋懈谢械. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 褍褋褌邪褉械胁邪械褌 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 胁芯懈薪邪

TEXT.English: Way of the Warrior Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Melee Units gain the Way of the Warrior promotion, giving them +1 Strength. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie du Guerrier est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s de M锚l茅e gagnent la promotion Voie du Guerrier, leur donnant +1 de Force. TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌褜 胁芯懈薪邪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 写谢褟 谐褉褍锌锌褘 芦袛褉械胁薪懈械 锌褍褌懈禄. 袙褋械 褞薪懈褌褘 斜谢懈卸薪械谐芯 斜芯褟 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯胁褘褕械薪懈械 锌芯 锌褍褌懈 袙芯懈薪邪, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 泻 小懈谢械. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 胁芯谢薪

TEXT.English: Way of the Waves Trait is only available with the Ancient Ways Group Wonders. All Naval Combat Units gain the Way of the Waves promotion, giving them +1 Strength. This promotion is only available during the Ancient era, it will be obsolete with Classical Lifestyle Technology.
TEXT.French: Le trait Voie des Vagues est uniquement disponible avec les Merveilles du Groupe des Voies Anciennes. Toutes les Unit茅s de Combat Naval gagnent la promotion Voie des Vagues, leur donnant +1 de Force. Cette promotion n'est disponible que pendant l'猫re Antique, elle deviendra obsol猫te avec la Technologie du Mode de vie Classique.
TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌褜 胁芯谢薪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 写谢褟 Wonders 谐褉褍锌锌褘 Ancient Ways. 袙褋械 胁芯械薪薪芯-屑芯褉褋泻懈械 斜芯械胁褘械 锌芯写褉邪蟹写械谢械薪懈褟 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌褉芯写胁懈卸械薪懈械 锌芯 锌褍褌懈 胁芯谢薪械薪懈泄, 锌芯写褌胁械褉卸写邪褞褌 懈屑 +1 泻 褋懈谢械. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍.

TEXT.Russian: 袩褍褌褜 芦袛懈泻芯褋褌懈禄 写芯褋褌褍锌械薪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 写谢褟 谐褉褍锌锌褘 芦袛褉械胁薪懈械 锌褍褌懈禄. 袙褋械 芯褌褉褟写褘 懈褋褋谢械写芯胁邪褌械谢械泄 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌褉芯写胁懈卸械薪懈械 芦袩褍褌褜 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写褘禄, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 泻 写胁懈卸械薪懈褞, -1 芯褌 褋褌芯懈屑芯褋褌懈 泻 锌芯写胁懈卸薪芯褋褌懈 懈 +1 泻 写邪谢褜薪芯褋褌懈 芯斜蟹芯褉邪. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.
袛褉械胁薪懈泄 锌褍褌褜 胁械褌褉邪

TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌懈 袙械褌褉邪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 谐褉褍锌锌械 褔褍写械褋 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 褋褌褉械谢泻芯胁褘械 懈 屑械褌邪褌械谢褜薪褘械 芯褌褉褟写褘 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌芯胁褘褕械薪懈械 锌芯 袩褍褌懈 袙械褌褉邪, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 泻 褋懈谢械. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.

Toutes les Unit茅s Canines gagnent la promotion Voie du Loup, leur donnant +1 de Mouvement, -1 Co没t de Mobilit茅 et +1 de Port茅e de Vision. TEXT.Russian: 效械褉褌邪 芦袩褍褌懈 袙芯谢泻邪禄 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 褋 谐褉褍锌锌芯泄 褔褍写械褋 袛褉械胁薪懈褏 袩褍褌械泄. 袙褋械 袣谢褘泻懈 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌褉芯写胁懈卸械薪懈械 袩褍褌褜 袙芯谢泻邪, 写邪胁邪褟 懈屑 +1 泻 写胁懈卸械薪懈褞, -1 芯褌 褋褌芯懈屑芯褋褌懈 写胁懈卸械薪懈褟 懈 +1 泻 褉邪写懈褍褋褍 芯斜蟹芯褉邪. 协褌邪 邪泻褑懈褟 写芯褋褌褍锌薪邪 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁 袛褉械胁薪褞褞 褝锌芯褏褍, 芯薪邪 斜褍写械褌 褍褋褌邪褉械胁褕械泄 褋 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈械泄 袗薪褌懈褔薪芯谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹邪 卸懈蟹薪懈.

袗薪褌懈泻谢械褉懈泻邪谢懈蟹屑 I

TEXT.English: This leader finds strong opposition from clergy of his country, due to his actions against the church, heretical ideas or something similar. As clergy doesn't want to voice its support for the ruler great people take a -15% hit. Monasteries all have a negative happiness bonus. Holy Cities in heathen lands cause extra negative revolution implications as do rival religions in your cities. - TR Team.
TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant rencontre une forte opposition du clerg茅 de son pays, en raison de ses actions contre l'茅glise, de ses id茅es h茅r茅tiques ou de quelque chose de similaire. Comme le clerg茅 ne veut pas exprimer son soutien au dirigeant, les personnages illustres subissent une p茅nalit茅 de -15%. Tous les monast猫res ont un bonus de bonheur n茅gatif. Les Villes Saintes en terres pa茂ennes causent des implications r茅volutionnaires n茅gatives suppl茅mentaires, tout comme les religions rivales dans vos villes. - 脡quipe TR.
TEXT.Italian: Questo leader trova una forte opposizione da parte del clero del suo stato, a causa delle sue azioni contro la chiesa, di idee eretiche o cose del genere. Dato che il clero non supporta il leader, i grandi personaggi nascono con una frequenza minore del 15%. Tutti i monasteri hanno delle penalit脿 alla felicit脿. Le citt脿 sante nei territori degli infedeli aumentano i sentimenti rivoluzionari, allo stesso modo in cui le religioni rivali influenzano le tue citt脿.
TEXT.Russian: 协褌芯褌 谢懈写械褉 胁褘蟹褘胁邪械褌 褋懈谢褜薪芯械 褋芯锌褉芯褌懈胁谢械薪懈械 褋芯 褋褌芯褉芯薪褘 写褍褏芯胁械薪褋褌胁邪 褋胁芯械泄 褋褌褉邪薪褘 懈蟹-蟹邪 械谐芯 写械泄褋褌胁懈泄 锌褉芯褌懈胁 褑械褉泻胁懈, 械褉械褌懈褔械褋泻懈褏 懈写械泄 懈谢懈 褔械谐芯-褌芯 锌芯写芯斜薪芯谐芯. 袩芯褋泻芯谢褜泻褍 写褍褏芯胁械薪褋褌胁芯 薪械 褏芯褔械褌 胁褘褉邪卸邪褌褜 褋胁芯褞 锌芯写写械褉卸泻褍 褌邪泻芯屑褍 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢褞, 胁械谢懈泻懈械 谢褞写懈 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 屑懈薪褍褋 15% 泻 褉芯卸写邪械屑芯褋褌懈. 袙褋械 屑芯薪邪褋褌褘褉懈 懈屑械褞褌 芯褌褉懈褑邪褌械谢褜薪褘泄 斜芯薪褍褋 泻 褋褔邪褋褌褜褞. 小胁褟褖械薪薪褘械 谐芯褉芯写邪 胁 褉芯写薪褘褏 蟹械屑谢褟褏 胁褘蟹褘胁邪褞褌 写芯锌芯谢薪懈褌械谢褜薪褘械 薪械谐邪褌懈胁薪褘械 锌芯褋谢械写褋褌胁懈褟 褉械胁芯谢褞褑懈懈, 泻邪泻 懈 泻芯薪泻褍褉懈褉褍褞褖懈械 褉械谢懈谐懈懈 胁 胁邪褕懈褏 谐芯褉芯写邪褏.
袗薪泻谢.

TEXT.English: A barbarian is an uncivilized person. The word is often used pejoratively, either in a general reference to a member of a nation or ethnos, typically a tribal society as seen by an urban civilization either viewed as inferior, or admired as a noble savage. In idiomatic or figurative usage, a "barbarian" may also be an individual reference to a brutal, cruel, warlike, insensitive person. The term originates in the ancient Greek civilization, meaning "anyone who is not Greek". Comparable notions are found in non-European civilizations.

TEXT.English: This leader never got any real education, and sees sponsorship of poets and playwrights as a needless waste of money. They should be happy he doesn't order to execute all those spineless wimps for swaying his troops from their spartan ways! Foreign infidels are viewed as just that, inferior scum who better get down with his ways, or lay down at the hands of his sword.
TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant n'a jamais re莽u d'茅ducation r茅elle et consid猫re le parrainage des po猫tes et des dramaturges comme un gaspillage d'argent inutile. Ils devraient 锚tre heureux qu'il n'ordonne pas l'ex茅cution de tous ces mauviettes sans colonne vert茅brale qui d茅tournent ses troupes de leurs mani猫res spartiates ! Les infid猫les 茅trangers sont consid茅r茅s comme tels, une racaille inf茅rieure qui ferait mieux de se plier 脿 ses m茅thodes, ou de succomber sous le tranchant de son 茅p茅e.
TEXT.Russian: 校 褝褌芯谐芯 谢懈写械褉邪 薪懈泻芯谐写邪 薪械 斜褘谢芯 薪邪褋褌芯褟褖械谐芯 芯斜褉邪蟹芯胁邪薪懈褟, 懈 芯薪 褋褔懈褌邪械褌 褋锌芯薪褋芯褉褋褌胁芯 锌芯褝褌芯胁 懈 写褉邪屑邪褌褍褉谐芯胁 薪邪锌褉邪褋薪芯泄 褌褉邪褌芯泄 写械薪械谐. 袨薪懈 写芯谢卸薪褘 斜褘褌褜 褋褔邪褋褌谢懈胁褘, 褔褌芯 芯薪 薪械 锌褉懈泻邪蟹邪谢 泻邪蟹薪懈褌褜 胁褋械褏 褝褌懈褏 斜械褋褏褉械斜械褌薪褘褏 褋谢邪斜邪泻芯胁 蟹邪 褌芯, 褔褌芯 芯薪懈 褋斜懈谢懈 械谐芯 胁芯泄褋泻邪 褋 懈褏 褋锌邪褉褌邪薪褋泻懈褏 锌褉懈胁褘褔械泻! 袠薪芯褋褌褉邪薪薪褘械 薪械胁械褉薪褘械 褉邪褋褋屑邪褌褉懈胁邪褞褌褋褟 泻邪泻 薪懈蟹褕懈械 锌芯写芯薪泻懈, 泻芯褌芯褉褘屑 谢褍褔褕械 褉邪褋褋褌褍锌邪褌褜褋褟 薪邪 械谐芯 锌褍褌懈 懈谢懈 锌邪褋褌褜 锌械褉械写 薪懈屑 薪懈褑.
袧械芯褌.
啸邪褉懈蟹屑邪
啸邪褉懈蟹屑邪 I

TEXT.English: Charismatic was introduced with the Warlords expansion pack (along with Imperialistic and Protective) and is definitely the best of the three new traits. It is clearly a warmonger's trait, mainly because of the reduced XP requirement for each promotion. By warring early, you can amass a force of highly-promoted veteran units which you can keep upgrading as the game progresses.[PARAGRAPH:1]The extra happiness from the trait and two buildings also helps with warmongering, since it reduces war weariness. It should also help you financially; whether you run a CE or SE or a hybrid, more population because of an elevated happiness cap always means a stronger economy.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MYSTICISM]Mysticism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_AGRICULTURE]Agriculture[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ANIMAL_HUSBANDRY]Animal Husbandry[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_RADIO]Radio[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASS_MEDIA]Mass Media[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STONEHENGE]Stonehenge[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HEROIC_EPIC]Heroic Epic[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MA_WEST_POINT]West Point[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_EIFFEL_TOWER]The Eiffel Tower[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_PENTAGON]The Pentagon[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MONUMENT]Monument[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BARRACKS]Barracks[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STABLE]Stable[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_DRYDOCK]Drydock[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BROADCAST_TOWER]Broadcast Tower[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Civics[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_VASSALAGE]Vassalage[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_THEOCRACY]Theocracy[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]When you're Charismatic, go to war early to collect those promotions and build your army of veterans. Playing with barbs, even raging barbs, turned on allows you to amass more promotions faster, so you will likely have a powerful army by the time you've dealt with the barbarians and are ready to turn on your neighbours.[PARAGRAPH:1]Also be sure to take advantage of the elevated happiness cap. Prioritize growth in the early game: ensure each city has good food resources, bee-line to Pottery so you can build Granaries, and build Workers so you can ensure all your extra citizens have improved tiles to work. Chop Workers and Settlers as much as possible to hurry their builds and get your cities back to growing their populations.[PARAGRAPH:1]Mysticism and Mass Media are obvious tech targets in order to enable the happiness-increasing buildings (which are, unfortunately, not made cheaper by the trait; Charismatic is one of the few traits without a cheap building). Alternatively, you may bee-line to Radio and build the Eiffel Tower, which gives you a free broadcast tower in every one of your cities.[PARAGRAPH:1]Stonehenge is also an attractive wonder, since it gives you a free monument in each city. However, remember that those monuments magically disappear once you discover Calendar (Astronomy in BtS). Broadcast Towers and the Eiffel Tower, in contrast, never become obsolete. Also, any monument you build directly stays put to produce culture, and the culture doubles after 1000 years.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]As mentioned above, while Charismatic enhances the effects of two buildings, it has no cheap building, a limitation it shares only with the Financial and Imperialistic traits.[PARAGRAPH:1]Balancing early growth with the need to have a large number of Workers to ensure those extra citizens have improved tiles to work can be tricky. In addition to ensuring each city has at least one food resource, also try to ensure it has forests for chop-rushing Workers.
TEXT.German: Die Eigenschaft "Charismatisch" wurde mit dem ersten Addon "Warlords" ins Spiel eingef眉hrt (zusammen mit "Imperialistisch" und "Sch眉tzend") und ist sicherlich die n眉tzlichste der drei neuen Eigenschaften. Sie ist eindeutig f眉r Kriegstreiber gedacht, haupts盲chlich wegen der gesenkten Erfahrungspunkte-Anforderungen f眉r Bef枚rderungen. Indem schon fr眉h Kriege gef眉hrt werden, k枚nnen sehr viele erfahrene, mit Massen von Bef枚rderungen versehene Einheiten angesammelt werden, die im weiteren Spielverlauf noch weiter bef枚rdert werden k枚nnen.[PARAGRAPH:1]Auch die zus盲tzliche Zufriedenheit dieser Eigenschaft und der zwei Geb盲ude unterst眉tzt das F眉hren von Kriegen, da sie die Kriegsunzufriedenheit senkt. Au脽erdem unterst眉tzt sie auch die eigene Wirtschaft; sei es nun eine H眉ttenwirtschaft (CE), eine Spezialistenwirtschaft (SE) oder eine Mischung, eine h枚here Bev枚lkerung auf Grund einer erh枚hten Zufriedenheitsobergrenze bedeutet immer auch eine st盲rkere Wirtschaft.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Wichtige Technologien[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MYSTICISM]Mystik[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_AGRICULTURE]Landwirtschaft[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ANIMAL_HUSBANDRY]Tierzucht[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_RADIO]Funkwesen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASS_MEDIA]Massenmedien[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Wunder[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STONEHENGE]Stonehenge[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HEROIC_EPIC]Heldenepos[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MA_WEST_POINT]West Point[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_EIFFEL_TOWER]Eiffelturm[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_PENTAGON]Pentagon[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Bevorzugte Geb盲ude[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MONUMENT]Monument[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BARRACKS]Kaserne[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_STABLE]Stallungen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_DRYDOCK]Trockendock[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BROADCAST_TOWER]Funkturm[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Gesellschaftsformen[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_VASSALAGE]Vasallentum[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_THEOCRACY]Theokratie[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Einsatzm枚glichkeiten[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Mit einem Oberhaupt mit der Eigenschaft "Charismatisch" sollten fr眉h Kriege gef眉hrt werden, um Bef枚rderungen zu erlangen und eine Armee erfahrener Einheiten aufstellen zu k枚nnen. Falls die Option "Barbaren", oder sogar "Rasende Barbaren", aktiviert wurde, k枚nnen mehr Bef枚rderungen noch schneller angesammelt werden, so dass sehr wahrscheinlich nach der Ausrottung der Barbaren eine schlagkr盲ftige Armee zur Verf眉gung steht, die dann bereit ist, sich den Nachbarzivilisationen zuzuwenden.[PARAGRAPH:1]Au脽erdem sollte von der erh枚hten Zufriedenheitsobergrenze Gebrauch gemacht werden. Der Schwerpunkt sollte bereits fr眉h in der Partie auf Wachstum gelegt werden: es sollte sichergestellt werden, dass jede Stadt 眉ber gute Nahrungsressourcen verf眉gt, die Forschung sollte geradewegs auf "Keramik" ausgerichtet werden, damit "Kornspeicher" errichtet werden k枚nnen, und Bautrupps sollten aufgestellt werden, damit diese f眉r die Modernisierung der Stadtgel盲ndefelder sorgen k枚nnen, die dann von den zus盲tzlichen B眉rgern bearbeitet werden k枚nnen. Bautrupps und Siedler sollten wenn m枚glich durch das Abholzen von W盲ldern beschleunigt werden, damit die St盲dte schneller wachsen k枚nnen.[PARAGRAPH:1]"Mystik" und "Massenmedien" stellen offensichtliche Forschungsziele dar, um die Geb盲ude verf眉gbar zu machen, die zur Erh枚hung der Zufriedenheit beitragen (die durch die Eigenschaft leider nicht verbilligt werden; "Charismatisch" ist eine der wenigen Eigenschaften ohne verbilligtes Geb盲ude). Wahlweise kann auch das "Funkwesen" erforscht werden und der "Eiffelturm" errichtet werden, der einen kostenlosen "Funkturm" in jeder eigenen Stadt gew盲hrt.[PARAGRAPH:1]"Stonehenge" ist ebenfalls ein attraktives Wunder, da es ein kostenloses "Monument" in jeder Stadt gew盲hrt. Jedoch sollte nicht vergessen werden, dass diese Monumente magischerweise verschwinden, wenn "Kalender" erfoscht wurde ("Astronomie" in BtS). Im Gegensatz dazu veralten Funkt眉rme und der Eiffelturm niemals. Au脽erdem verbleibt jedes selbst errichtete Monument in einer Stadt und generiert Kulturpunkte, die sich nach 1000 Jahren sogar verdoppeln.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Nachteile[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Wie oben erw盲hnt, erh枚ht die Eigenschaft "Charismatisch" zwar den Effekt zweier Geb盲ude, verf眉gt aber selbst 眉ber kein verbilligtes Geb盲ude, was eine Beschr盲nkung ist, die sie nur mit den Eigenschaften "Finanzorientiert" und "Imperialistisch" teilt.[PARAGRAPH:1]Es kann etwas schwierig sein, das fr眉he Wachstum mit der Notwendigkeit zu vereinen, viele Bautrupps aufstellen zu m眉ssen, die sicherstellen, dass die zus盲tzlichen B眉rger modernisierte Gel盲ndefelder bearbeiten k枚nnen. Zus盲tzlich muss jede Stadt mit mindestens einer Nahrungsressource versorgt sein und sollte au脽erdem in der N盲he von W盲ldern gelegen sein, damit die Aufstellung von Bautrupps beschleunigt werden kann.

袦械褑械薪邪褌褋褌胁芯 I

TEXT.English: Creative is powerful early in the game, allowing you to quickly expand your borders and thereby claim territory and resources. The Warlords 2.08 patch added cheap Libraries, one of the best buildings in the game, making this trait even better.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_WRITING]Writing[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_DRAMA]Drama[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CONSTRUCTION]Construction[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]n/a[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LIBRARY]Library[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THEATRE]Theatre[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_COLOSSEUM]Colosseum[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]The big benefit Creative provides is allowing you more freedom in your city placement and in your early city builds. You don't have to worry about placing a city so a crucial resource is in its first ring of workable tiles so you can access it right away; it will be workable within a few short turns of founding the city. You can also skip monuments, Stonehenge, and spreading a religion (well, you can be a little more relaxed about the latter, at least).[PARAGRAPH:1]In addition, Creative may allow you to win some early game tug-o-war battles with a nearby civ over a key resource tile. By the same token, if the map lends itself to it, you can use the trait to seal off territory at a choke point. Creative is also something of a defensive trait, a cousin to Protective. By expanding your borders earlier and infusing the tiles with your culture, you have more territory that the enemy has to trudge through to attack you. It's also harder for another civilization to take tiles from you by city placement or by conquering cities. Creative also raises the cultural defense of a city faster, making it tougher to conquer.[PARAGRAPH:1]Writing enables the trait's cheap libraries, so it's obviously an even more important tech than before. The cheap theatres and coliseums may or may not be useful, depending on your strategy and circumstances in the game. You may want to warmonger in the mid or late game to get your most out of these buildings, using them to decrease war weariness.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Creative is a trait that is extremely useful in the early game and gets weaker as the game goes on. The +2[ICON_CULTURE] becomes less and less of a factor as the game progresses and more methods of producing culture accrue in each city. Also, the cheap buildings are available early and are all relatively cheap to begin with, so their faster production times will be less noticeable later in the game. By the middle of most games, the Creative trait is mostly a non-factor.
TEXT.German: Die Eigenschaft "Kreativ" ist vor allem in der fr眉hen Phase einer Partie sehr n眉tzlich, da sie die schnelle Erweiterung der eigenen Grenzen und damit die Inbesitznahme von neuen Gebieten und Ressourcen erlaubt. Der Patch 2.08 f眉r das erste Addon "Warlords" f眉gte der Eigenschaft verbilligte Bibliotheken hinzu, die zu den besten Geb盲uden des Spiels z盲hlen, wodurch die Eigenschaft noch weiter aufgewertet wurde.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Wichtige Technologien[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_WRITING]Schrift[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_DRAMA]Drama[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CONSTRUCTION]Bauwesen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Wunder[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]keine[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Bevorzugte Geb盲ude[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LIBRARY]Bibliothek[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THEATRE]Theater[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_COLOSSEUM]Kolosseum[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Einsatzm枚glichkeiten[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Der gro脽e Vorteil der Eigenschaft "Kreativ" besteht darin, dass mehr Freiheiten bei der Gr眉ndung einer Stadt und deren ersten Bauprojekten bestehen. Bei der Gr眉ndung einer Stadt muss nicht unbedingt darauf geachtet werden, dass sich eine wichtige Ressource im ersten Stadtfeldring befindet, damit sie sofort zug盲nglich ist; schon wenige Runden nach Gr眉ndung der Stadt steht sie zur Verf眉gung. Au脽erdem k枚nnen Monumente, Stonehenge und die Verbreitung einer Religion au脽er Acht gelassen werden (nun, die letztere Aufgabe kann zumindest etwas entspannter angegangen werden).[PARAGRAPH:1]Zus盲tzlich kann die Eigenschaft "Kreativ" dabei helfen, schon fr眉h in einer Partie das Tauziehen mit anderen Zivilisationen um Schl眉sselgel盲ndefelder, die mit wichtigen Ressourcen versehen sind, zu gewinnen. Ebenso kann die Eigenschaft, falls die Karte es erlaubt, dazu verwendet werden, um das Gebiet um einen Engpass abzuriegeln. "Kreativ" ist eher eine defensive Eigenschaft, nah verwandt mit der Eigenschaft "Sch眉tzend". Durch die fr眉he Erweiterung der eigenen Grenzen und die Belegung der Gel盲ndefelder mit der eigenen Kultur muss sich ein Gegner durch ein gro脽es Gebiet qu盲len, bevor er angreifen kann. Au脽erdem wird es f眉r andere Zivilisationen schwieriger, Gel盲ndefelder durch die Gr眉ndung von St盲dten oder deren Eroberung f眉r sich zu gewinnen. Durch die Eigenschaft "Kreativ" erh枚ht sich der kulturelle Widerstand einer Stadt schneller, wodurch sie schwerer zu erobern ist.[PARAGRAPH:1]Die Technologie "Schrift" schaltet die verbilligten Bibliotheken frei, so dass diese Technologie offensichtlich sogar noch wichtiger ist als zuvor. Die verbilligten Theater und Kolosseen k枚nnen, abh盲ngig von der eigenen Strategie und den Umst盲nden der Partie, hilfreich sein oder auch nicht. Im mittleren bis sp盲ten Spielverlauf sollte ein Krieg gef眉hrt werden, um den gr枚脽ten Nutzen aus diesen Geb盲uden ziehen zu k枚nnen, indem sie zur Verringerung der Kriegsunzufriedenheit eingesetzt werden.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Nachteile[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]"Kreativ" ist eine Eigenschaft, die in der fr眉hen Phase einer Partie sehr n眉tzlich ist und w盲hrend des weiteren Spielverlaufs seinen Nutzen verliert. Die zus盲tzlichen +2[ICON_CULTURE] werden immer weniger entscheidend w盲hrend die Partie fortschreitet und sich in jeder Stadt mehr M枚glichkeiten zur Generierung von Kulturpunkten ergeben. Au脽erdem sind die verbilligten Geb盲ude schon fr眉h in einer Partie verf眉gbar und daher gleich zu Anfang relativ g眉nstig, so dass deren schnellere Produktionszeiten sp盲ter in der Partie weniger von Vorteil sind. In der Mitte der meisten Partien spielt die Eigenschaft "Kreativ" fast keine Rolle mehr.

TEXT.English: This leader believes it is better to be feared than to be loved, and diligently works to instill that fear into parts of his society he deems most dangerous to his own dominance. Constant purges in the army leave its leadership weakened, with less able men eligible for promotions. - TR Team.
TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant croit qu'il vaut mieux 锚tre craint qu'锚tre aim茅, et travaille diligemment pour instiller cette peur dans les parties de sa soci茅t茅 qu'il juge les plus dangereuses pour sa propre domination. Des purges constantes dans l'arm茅e laissent son leadership affaibli, avec moins d'hommes capables 茅ligibles aux promotions. - 脡quipe TR.
TEXT.Italian: Questo leader crede che sia meglio essere temuti che amati, e si impegna diligentemente per instillare la paura nelle parti della societ脿 che ritiene pi霉 pericolose per il suo governo. Purghe costanti nell'esercito rendono pi霉 debole la sua leadership, con pochi uomini abili che possono ottenere le promozioni.
TEXT.Russian: 协褌芯褌 谢懈写械褉 褋褔懈褌邪械褌, 褔褌芯 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢褟 写芯谢卸薪褘 斜芯谢褜褕械 斜芯褟褌褜褋褟, 薪械卸械谢懈 谢褞斜懈褌褜, 懈 褍褋械褉写薪芯 褉邪斜芯褌邪械褌 薪邪写 褌械屑, 褔褌芯斜褘 胁薪褍褕懈褌褜 褝褌芯褌 褋褌褉邪褏 褌械屑 褔邪褋褌褟屑 褋胁芯械谐芯 芯斜褖械褋褌胁邪, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 芯薪 褋褔懈褌邪械褌 薪邪懈斜芯谢械械 芯锌邪褋薪褘屑懈 写谢褟 褋胁芯械谐芯 褋芯斜褋褌胁械薪薪芯谐芯 锌褉邪胁谢械薪懈褟. 袩芯褋褌芯褟薪薪褘械 褔懈褋褌泻懈 胁 邪褉屑懈懈 芯褋谢邪斜谢褟褞褌 械械 褉褍泻芯胁芯写褋褌胁芯, 懈 屑械薪械械 褋锌芯褋芯斜薪褘械 谢褞写懈 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 胁芯蟹屑芯卸薪芯褋褌褜 胁芯蟹胁褘褋懈褌褜褋褟.

TEXT.French: La cour opulente de ce dirigeant repr茅sente une r茅elle contrainte pour le budget de l'脡tat. - 脡quipe TR.
TEXT.Russian: 袩褘褕薪褘泄 写胁芯褉 褝褌懈褏 谢懈写械褉芯胁 谢芯卸懈褌褋褟 褌褟卸械谢褘屑 斜褉械屑械薪械屑 薪邪 谐芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪褘泄 斜褞写卸械褌.

TEXT.English: Expansive doesn't look that great at first glance. In fact, it first appears to belong in the category of "weak" traits, like Protective. After all, health is not a big problem; it's happiness that cramps your growth early in the game. And once you get used to those sickly green tendrils floating around your city, you realize that its effects aren't usually that bad. Health problems just slow growth a little.[PARAGRAPH:1]But hang on. Granaries--cheap for Expansive leaders--are one of the most useful buildings in the game. With grains, they provide additional health. But more importantly, they allow you to leverage slavery by growing your sacrificed population back faster.[PARAGRAPH:1]And with the Warlords 2.08 patch, Expansive got a needed boost thanks to slightly cheaper workers. You can always use more workers, especially early in the game.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_POTTERY]Pottery[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_COMPASS]Compass[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]Bronze Working[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MATHEMATICS]Mathematics[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_HANGING_GARDENS]The Hanging Gardens[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_NOTRE_DAME]Notre Dame[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_GRANARY]Granary[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HARBOR]Harbor[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1]Bee-line to Pottery. Build (or whip) your cheap granaries. Thanks to the granary, the population will grow back faster, allowing you to whip them again.[PARAGRAPH:1]Obviously, build more Workers since they're cheaper for you, and put them to work. Get your tiles improved and your resources connected faster. Just remember that the +25% for Worker builds is accelerated by hammers, not by food, so you'll need to improve some tiles with good production and work them while the Worker is being built to take advantage of this. Since harbours are cheap, try to claim several coastal cities so you can leverage the advantages of that cheap building.[PARAGRAPH:1]Also look for opportunities to leverage that +2 health. Early on, you can place a city smack-dab in the jungle, for example, or surrounded by flood plains. In addition, you can construct health reducing buildings like forges and factories with less concern for their impact on health. You can chop more forests because you don't need their health benefits (hence the attractiveness of the Bronze Working and Mathematics techs). Just keep in mind that the trait does not make your cities invincible, and you will have to concern yourself with their health--just later rather than sooner.[PARAGRAPH:1]The Hanging Gardens is an attractive wonder for Expansive. It might not seem so at first--I already have a health boost, why do I need more? Because you're pursuing a strategy that pushes the envelope of your cities' health, that's why. I'm fond of wonders and buildings that further enhance a trait's benefits (which is why I like to try to build the Parthenon when I'm playing as a Philosophical leader, for example). The Hanging Gardens also provides more citizens to whip away. And hey--GPP towards a Great Engineer! You gotta like that.[PARAGRAPH:1]Notre Dame can also be handy. If you're whipping 'til your hands bleed, the big cathedral's happy boost may be very welcome indeed.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Like many other traits such as Creative, the effects of Expansive diminish as the game goes on. Other means of increasing health appear, the cheap buildings are early ones, and by the end of the game, once your railroad network is complete, your plentiful, cheap workers start to become idle. You may also switch away from the Slavery civic, losing one of the principal benefits of the cheap granaries.[PARAGRAPH:1]And as with most other traits, Expansive does not provide any direct economic benefits.
TEXT.German: Die Eigenschaft "Expansiv" sieht auf den ersten Blick nicht besonders interessant aus. Tats盲chlich scheint sie, in die Kategorie der "schwachen" Eigenschaften zu geh枚ren, wie beispielsweise "Sch眉tzend". Immerhin ist Gesundheit kein gro脽es Problem, schlie脽lich ist es die Zufriedenheit, die fr眉h in einer Partie das eigene Wachstum hemmt. Und sobald diese kr盲nklichen gr眉nen Ranken, die um die eigenen St盲dte schweben, zur Normalit盲t geworden sind, wird klar, dass ihre Auswirkungen in der Regel nicht so schlimm sind. Probleme mit der Gesundheit einer Stadt verlangsamen das Wachstum nur ein wenig.[PARAGRAPH:1]Aber abwarten. Kornspeicher, die f眉r Oberh盲upter mit der Eigenschaft "Expansiv" relativ g眉nstig sind, sind eines der n眉tzlichsten Geb盲ude im Spiel. Falls eine Getreide-Ressource verf眉gbar ist, erzeugen sie zus盲tzliche Gesundheit. Aber, was noch wichtiger ist, sie erm枚glichen den wirksamen Einsatz der Gesellschaftsform "Sklaverei", da geopferte B眉rger schneller "nachwachsen".[PARAGRAPH:1]Und mit dem Patch 2.08 f眉r das erste Addon "Warlords" erhielt die Eigenschaft "Expansiv" eine dringend n枚tige Verst盲rkung durch leicht verbilligte Bautrupps. Es ist immer besser, mehr Bautrupps einsetzen zu k枚nnen, besonders in der fr眉hen Phase einer Partie.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Wichtige Technologien[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_POTTERY]Keramik[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_COMPASS]Kompass[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]Bronzeverarbeitung[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MATHEMATICS]Mathematik[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Wunder[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_HANGING_GARDENS]H盲ngende G盲rten[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_NOTRE_DAME]Notre-Dame[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Bevorzugte Geb盲ude[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_GRANARY]Kornspeicher[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_HARBOR]Hafen[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]N眉tzliche Gesellschaftsformen[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Einsatzm枚glichkeiten[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Das erste Forschungziel sollte "Keramik" sein. Au脽erdem sollten die verbilligten Kornspeicher errichtet werden (oder deren Produktion durch Zwangsarbeit beschleunigt werden). Die Produktion sollte immer durch Zwangsarbeit beschleunigt werden und zwar, wenn m枚glich, w盲hrend der gesamten Partie. Dank dem Kornspeicher, wird die Bev枚lkerung schneller nachwachsen, wodurch der erneute Einsatz der Zwangsarbeit erm枚glicht wird.[PARAGRAPH:1]Offensichtlich sollten auch mehr Bautrupps aufgestellt und eingesetzt werden, da sie ebenfalls verbilligt verf眉gbar sind. Eigene Gel盲ndefelder sollten so schnell wie m枚glich mit Modernisierungen ausgestattet und Ressourcen erschlossen werden. Dabei sollte nicht vergessen werden, dass die 25% h枚here Produktionsgeschwindigkeit f眉r Bautrupps von der Produktionsleistung abh盲ngt und nicht von der Nahrungsproduktion, so dass einige Gel盲ndefelder mit produktionsf枚rdernden Modernisierungen ausgestattet und diese auch w盲hrend der Produktion eines Bautrupps bearbeitet werden sollten. Da H盲fen ebenfalls verbilligt sind, sollte versucht werden, einige K眉stenst盲dte zu erlangen, so dass der Vorteil dieses Geb盲udes auch genutzt werden kann.[PARAGRAPH:1]Au脽erdem sollte nach M枚glichkeiten Ausschau gehalten werden, um die zus盲tzlichen +2 Gesundheit wirksam einsetzen zu k枚nnen. Beispielsweise kann schon fr眉h eine Stadt mitten im Dschungel oder im Schwemmland platziert werden. Zus盲tzlich k枚nnen gesundheitsvermindernde Geb盲ude wie Schmieden und Fabriken errichtet werden, ohne deren Einfluss auf die Gesundheit einer Stadt ber眉cksichtigen zu m眉ssen. Es k枚nnen auch mehr W盲lder abgeholzt werden, da deren Gesundheitsboni nicht ben枚tigt (deswegen sind die Technologien "Bronzeverarbeitung" und "Mathematik" so interessant). Allerdings macht die Eigenschaft "Expansiv" die eigenen St盲dte nicht unbesiegbar, die Besch盲ftigung mit der Gesundheit der eigenen St盲dte wird nur weiter nach hinten verschoben als sonst 眉blich.[PARAGRAPH:1]Die "H盲ngende G盲rten" sind ein interessantes Weltwunder f眉r diese Eigenschaft. Auf den ersten Blick erscheint dies nicht so: Ein Gesundheitsbonus ist schon vorhanden. Warum sollte ein zus盲tzlicher ben枚tigt werden? Weil mit dieser Eigenschaft eine Strategie verfolgt wird, die die Gesundheit der eigenen St盲dte bis zum 脛u脽ersten treibt, deshalb. Es sollten bevorzugt Wunder und Geb盲ude errichtet werden, die die Vorteile einer Eigenschaft noch weiter erh枚hen (deshalb kann beispielsweise bei einem Oberhaupt mit der Eigenschaft "Philosophisch" versucht werden, das "Parthenon" zu errichten). Die "H盲ngende G盲rten" erh枚hen au脽erdem die Bev枚lkerungszahl, die wiederum f眉r Zwangsarbeit eingesetzt werden k枚nnen. Und gew盲hren noch Gro脽e Pers枚nlichkeit-Punkte f眉r einen Gro脽en Ingenieur! Das ist gro脽artig.[PARAGRAPH:1]Das Weltwunder "Notre-Dame" kann ebenfalls n眉tzlich sein. Bei wiederholtem Einsatz der Zwangsarbeit, kann der Zufriedenheitsbonus dieser gro脽en Kathedrale tats盲chlich sehr angenehm sein.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Nachteile[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Wie bei vielen andere Eigenschaften, beispielsweise "Kreativ", lassen die Vorteile der Eigenschaft "Expansiv" im Verlauf einer Partie nach. Andere Methoden, um die Gesundheit zu erh枚hen, werden verf眉gbar, die verbilligten Geb盲ude sind nur in der fr眉hen Phase einer Partie von Vorteil und sobald das eigene Schienennetz gegen Ende einer Partie vollendet ist, werden die Massen von billigen Bautrupps nutzlos. Au脽erdem k枚nnte der Wunsch aufkommen, von der "Sklaverei" zu einer anderen Gesellschaftsform zu wechseln, wodurch einer der Hauptvorteile der verbilligten Kornspeicher verloren ginge.[PARAGRAPH:1]Und wie viele andere Eigenschaften gew盲hrt "Expansiv" keine direkten wirtschaftlichen Vorteile.

TEXT.English: This ruler puts blind faith above all other merits; talented but sceptically minded people will find themselves unwanted at his court. - TR Team.
TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant place la foi aveugle au-dessus de tous les autres m茅rites ; les personnes talentueuses mais d'esprit sceptique se retrouveront ind茅sirables 脿 sa cour. - 脡quipe TR.
TEXT.Russian: 协褌懈 谢懈写械褉褘 褋褌邪胁褟褌 褋谢械锌褍褞 胁械褉褍 胁褘褕械 胁褋械褏 写褉褍谐懈褏 写芯褋褌芯懈薪褋褌胁; 褌邪谢邪薪褌谢懈胁褘械, 薪芯 褋泻械锌褌懈褔械褋泻懈 薪邪褋褌褉芯械薪薪褘械 谢褞写懈 芯泻邪卸褍褌褋褟 薪械卸械谢邪褌械谢褜薪褘屑懈 锌褉懈 懈褏 写胁芯褉械.

袣芯屑屑械褉褑懈褟
袣芯屑屑械褉褑懈褟 I

TEXT.English: This is quite probably the strongest of the traits, at least at levels below Emperor, so much so that many players consider Financial to be a "crutch" and avoid leaders with this trait because they feel it offers an unfair advantage. The game developers apparently agreed, hence in one of the early patches they removed the double production speed of banks to lessen its power. Even so, Financial remains a truly awesome trait.[PARAGRAPH:1]At first, it seems so subtle: +1[ICON_COMMERCE] on some tiles? So what?[PARAGRAPH:1]The answer, of course, is this: It's the economy, stupid. Say what you want about military, research, religion, and other game elements; ultimately, your civilization requires a robust economy in order to support everything else you do. Military units incur maintenance costs, more so if they're outside of your territory. Cities likewise have maintenance costs, hampering your rate of expansion and requiring you to ensure each city can somehow pay for itself. And to keep up in technology you have to be able to set aside funds to support research. The Financial trait makes all of these tasks a little easier--if handled well, a lot easier.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_POTTERY]Pottery[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CURRENCY]Currency[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_GUILDS]Guilds[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BANKING]Banking[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_LIBERALISM]Liberalism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_PRINTING_PRESS]Printing Press[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_DEMOCRACY]Democracy[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CORPORATION]Corporation[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_COLOSSUS]The Colossus[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_WALL_STREET]Wall Street[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MARKET]Market[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_GROCER]Grocer[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BANK]Bank[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LIBRARY]Library[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_UNIVERSITY]University[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_OBSERVATORY]Observatory[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LABORATORY]Laboratory[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]The main way to leverage the financial trait is very straightforward: cottage spam. Yes, the tried-and-true Cottage Economy, or CE. Have your [LINK=UNIT_WORKER]Workers[\LINK] lay down as many [LINK=IMPROVEMENT_COTTAGE]cottages[\LINK] as your population can work while still working other worthwhile tiles as well. I'm especially fond of placing cottages on riverside grassland tiles, as the Financial benefit kicks in as soon as the cottage is built, and the 2 food feeds the citizen working the tile (floodplains, with 3 food, are even better for cottages, supporting city growth along with the economy). Just remember you may have to irrigate some of those tiles instead, by placing farms on them, in order to feed and grow your population and/or to chain irrigate another tile. Make sure you have citizens working the cottages steadily, however, as it's the only way to make them grow and increase their revenue.[PARAGRAPH:1]In addition, be on the lookout for resources that provide additional commerce. Gems, gold, and silver are obvious targets, but spices, silk, and wine are good as well; all will earn you the +1[ICON_COMMERCE] benefit in addition to the additional commerce of the resource. You want to claim these resources, ensure they're in a city's fat cross, and are improved and then worked by a citizen. Most of the commerce-rich resources also increase happiness, which means you can grow your other cities larger and, in turn, work more cottages and other commerce-rich tiles.[PARAGRAPH:1]Since you'll have all that extra commerce rolling in, prioritize buildings that do something with it, and the technologies that enable them. Libraries, monasteries, universities, observatories, and laboratories all multiply the amount of research you convert from commerce via the science slider, while markets, grocers, and banks multiply whatever gold is left over. In addition, Printing Press will increase the yield from your cottage investment, as will the Free Speech civic. Emancipation will make any immature cottages grow faster.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]First off, Financial provides no direct benefit to a tile that isn't providing at least 2 commerce. This can make you reluctant to work tiles without the benefit, even though you will need to. This means a production city, which mostly works hammer-rich rather than commerce-rich tiles, gains no direct benefit from the trait. You will, however, need at least one production city, preferably more, so don't overlook them in favour of commerce cities. The same goes for tile improvements. Yes, you can place a cottage on a grassland hill. But should you? A mine would provide much-needed hammers, something commerce cities often chronically lack.[PARAGRAPH:1]The biggest problem with Financial, however, is the vulnerability of your economy, especially as time goes on. It takes a lot of turns to make a cottage grow into a town, but that investment can be quickly undone by a couple of pillaging enemy units. And the not-inconsiderable amount of gold to be gained from pillaging cottages is very tempting to the AI. You will need to garrison your best, oldest commerce cities with anti-pillaging units if you go to war. Also try to have your best commerce cities inland at the heart of your empire, rather than on the more vulnerable borders or coastline.

枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫每 貌冒氓谩贸氓貌 莽盲冒脿芒卯茅 媒锚卯铆卯矛猫锚猫 梅貌卯谩没 茂卯盲盲氓冒忙猫芒脿貌眉 芒帽氓 卯帽貌脿毛眉铆卯氓, 梅貌卯 芒没 盲氓毛脿氓貌氓. 脗卯氓铆铆没氓 镁铆猫貌没 貌冒氓谩贸镁貌 盲氓铆氓忙铆卯茫卯 帽卯盲氓冒忙脿铆猫每, 谩卯毛眉酶氓 貌卯茫卯, 氓帽毛猫 卯铆猫 芒铆氓 芒脿酶氓茅 貌氓冒冒猫貌卯冒猫猫. 脙卯冒卯盲脿 脿铆脿毛卯茫猫梅铆卯 猫矛氓镁貌 袣褋械薪芯褎懈谢懈褟
袣褋械薪芯褎懈谢懈褟 I

TEXT.English: This leader rules his/her nation with the preconception that through a deep understanding of foreign affairs and that by heavily investing in trade and international relations - the nation and its people will ultimately be better off. This is true to an extent, but due to a lack of domestic investment and concentration, certain areas are on the contrary - backward and lacking. This correlates directly in a number of tangible ways, some beneficial, some detrimental - overall it leads to cultural disadvantage and domestic neglect.
TEXT.Russian: 协褌芯褌 谢懈写械褉 褍锌褉邪胁谢褟械褌 褋胁芯械泄 薪邪褑懈械泄 褋 锌褉械写胁蟹褟褌褘屑 屑薪械薪懈械屑, 褔褌芯 斜谢邪谐芯写邪褉褟 谐谢褍斜芯泻芯屑褍 锌芯薪懈屑邪薪懈褞 懈薪芯褋褌褉邪薪薪褘褏 写械谢 懈 蟹薪邪褔懈褌械谢褜薪褘屑 懈薪胁械褋褌懈褑懈褟屑 胁 褌芯褉谐芯胁谢褞 懈 屑械卸写褍薪邪褉芯写薪褘械 芯褌薪芯褕械薪懈褟 褋褌褉邪薪邪 懈 薪邪褉芯写 胁 泻芯薪械褔薪芯屑 懈褌芯谐械 斜褍写褍褌 锌褉芯褑胁械褌邪褌褜. 协褌芯 胁 薪械泻芯褌芯褉芯泄 褋褌械锌械薪懈 胁械褉薪芯, 薪芯 懈蟹-蟹邪 薪械褏胁邪褌泻懈 胁薪褍褌褉械薪薪懈褏 懈薪胁械褋褌懈褑懈泄 懈 褋泻芯薪褑械薪褌褉懈褉芯胁邪薪薪芯褋褌懈 薪邪 胁薪械褕薪械泄 锌芯谢懈褌懈泻械, 薪邪芯斜芯褉芯褌, 胁薪褍褌褉械薪薪褟褟 褌芯褉谐芯胁谢褟 懈 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁芯 褋褌邪谐薪懈褉褍褞褌. 协褌芯 薪邪锌褉褟屑褍褞 褋胁褟蟹邪薪芯 褋 薪械褋泻芯谢褜泻懈屑懈 芯褖褍褌懈屑褘屑懈 褋锌芯褋芯斜邪屑懈, 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘械 懈蟹 泻芯褌芯褉褘褏 芯写薪懈 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘, 邪 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘械 - 胁褉械写薪褘, 懈 胁 褑械谢芯屑 褝褌芯 胁械写械褌 泻 泻褍谢褜褌褍褉薪芯屑褍 褍锌邪写泻褍 懈 芯斜褖械屑褍 蟹邪褋褌芯褞 胁薪褍褌褉懈 写械褉卸邪胁褘.

TEXT.English: Humanitarian leaders try to make everyone happy and healthy
TEXT.French: Les dirigeants humanitaires essaient de rendre tout le monde heureux et en bonne sant茅
TEXT.Russian: 孝邪泻懈械 谢懈写械褉褘 褋褌邪褉邪褞褌褋褟 褋写械谢邪褌褜 胁褋械褏 褋褔邪褋褌谢懈胁褘屑懈 懈 蟹写芯褉芯胁褘屑懈.

TEXT.Russian: 袨褏芯褌邪 懈 褋芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯
袨褏芯褌邪 懈 褋芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯 I

TEXT.English: A hunter-gatherer society is one whose primary subsistence method involves the direct procurement of edible plants and animals from the wild, foraging and hunting without significant recourse to the domestication of either. Up to 80% of the food is obtained by gathering.
TEXT.French: Une soci茅t茅 de chasseurs-cueilleurs est une soci茅t茅 dont la principale m茅thode de subsistance implique l'approvisionnement direct en plantes et animaux comestibles sauvages, la cueillette et la chasse sans recours significatif 脿 la domestication de l'un ou l'autre. Jusqu'脿 80% de la nourriture est obtenue par la cueillette.
TEXT.Russian: 袨斜褖械褋褌胁芯 芯褏芯褌薪懈泻芯胁-褋芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢械泄 - 褝褌芯 褋芯褑懈褍屑, 芯褋薪芯胁薪芯泄 褋锌芯褋芯斜 褋褍褖械褋褌胁芯胁邪薪懈褟 泻芯褌芯褉芯谐芯 胁泻谢褞褔邪械褌 锌褉褟屑褘械 锌芯褋褌邪胁泻懈 褋褗械写芯斜薪褘褏 褉邪褋褌械薪懈泄 懈 卸懈胁芯褌薪褘褏 懈蟹 写懈泻芯泄 锌褉懈褉芯写褘, 写芯斜褘褔褍 锌懈褖懈 懈 芯褏芯褌褍 斜械蟹 蟹薪邪褔懈褌械谢褜薪芯谐芯 芯写芯屑邪褕薪懈胁邪薪懈褟 褌芯谐芯 懈 写褉褍谐芯谐芯. 袛芯 80% 锌褉芯写芯胁芯谢褜褋褌胁懈褟 锌芯谢褍褔邪褞褌 锌褍褌械屑 芯褏芯褌褘 懈 褋芯斜懈褉邪褌械谢褜褋褌胁邪.
袨-小.
袠写械邪谢懈蟹屑
袠写械邪谢懈蟹屑 I

TEXT.English: This leader's belief in an exalted ideal leads to strict guidelines to follow. This spills out across the government meaning gross inefficiency, longer civic anarchy and higher upkeep. This exalted ideal does however possess a certain quality that lingers in the minds of the great thinkers from within the nation, meaning a greater affinity towards to desire to actually 'think' and the aspiration to be a 'thinker'.
TEXT.French: La croyance de ce dirigeant en un id茅al exalt茅 conduit 脿 des directives strictes 脿 suivre. Cela se r茅percute sur l'ensemble du gouvernement, entra卯nant une inefficacit茅 flagrante, une anarchie civique plus longue et des co没ts d'entretien plus 茅lev茅s. Cet id茅al exalt茅 poss猫de cependant une certaine qualit茅 qui persiste dans l'esprit des grands penseurs de la nation, signifiant une plus grande affinit茅 envers le d茅sir de r茅ellement 'penser' et l'aspiration 脿 锚tre un 'penseur'.
TEXT.Italian: Le credenze di questo leader negli ideali umanisti gli fa preferire la diplomazia alla forza militare per risolvere i conflitti. Naturalmente, viene criticato dal suo stesso staff militare e dai politici pi霉 famelici, che cercano di minare i suoi sforzi.
TEXT.Russian: 袙械褉邪 褝褌芯谐芯 谢懈写械褉邪 胁 胁芯蟹胁褘褕械薪薪褘械 懈写械邪谢褘 胁械写械褌 泻 蟹邪褋懈谢褜褞 褋褌褉芯谐懈褏 锌褉邪胁懈谢 懈 薪芯褉屑, 泻芯褌芯褉褘屑 薪褍卸薪芯 褋谢械写芯胁邪褌褜. 协褌芯 褉邪褋锌褉芯褋褌褉邪薪褟械褌褋褟 薪邪 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯, 褔褌芯 芯蟹薪邪褔邪械褌 谐褉褍斜褍褞 薪械褝褎褎械泻褌懈胁薪芯褋褌褜, 斜芯谢械械 写谢懈褌械谢褜薪褍褞 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻褍褞 邪薪邪褉褏懈褞 懈 斜芯谢械械 胁褘褋芯泻懈泄 褍褉芯胁械薪褜 褋芯写械褉卸邪薪懈褟. 协褌芯褌 胁芯蟹胁褘褕械薪薪褘泄 懈写械邪谢, 芯写薪邪泻芯, 芯斜谢邪写邪械褌 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪褘屑 泻邪褔械褋褌胁芯屑, 泻芯褌芯褉芯械 褋芯褏褉邪薪褟械褌褋褟 胁 褍屑邪褏 胁械谢懈泻懈褏 屑褘褋谢懈褌械谢械泄 胁薪褍褌褉懈 薪邪褑懈懈, 褔褌芯 芯蟹薪邪褔邪械褌 斜芯谢褜褕褍褞 褌褟谐褍 泻 卸械谢邪薪懈褞 写械泄褋褌胁懈褌械谢褜薪芯 芦写褍屑邪褌褜禄 懈 褋褌褉械屑谢械薪懈械 斜褘褌褜 芦屑褘褋谢懈褌械谢械屑禄.
袠写械邪.
袠屑锌械褉懈邪谢懈蟹屑
袠屑锌械褉懈邪谢懈蟹屑 I

TEXT.English: After several off-line games as Julius Caesar, my opinion of this trait has improved. I originally included it in the "Weak" category, but now feel it belongs in "Medium"--if it's used properly.[PARAGRAPH:1]Imperialistic supports aggressive expansion in two ways. First of all, Settlers are cheaper to build, allowing you to perform a faster land-grab early in the game. Second, to take advantage of the increased Great General emergence, you're encouraged to expand through aggression.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]Bronze Working[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASONRY]Masonry[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MATHEMATICS]Mathematics[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CODE_OF_LAWS]Code of Laws[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_FASCISM]Fascism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]All military technologies[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_GREAT_WALL_OF_CHINA]The Great Wall[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MT_RUSHMORE]Mount Rushmore[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_BARRACKS]Barracks[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Civics[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_VASSALAGE]Vassalage[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_THEOCRACY]Theocracy[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Obviously, pursue a REX (Rapid EXpansion) strategy in the early game, and follow this up with an aggressive, warmonger's expansion policy once your core cities are established. This especially suits Catherine the Great of Russia, since her Creative trait has definite synergy with an early game land-grabbing strategy.[PARAGRAPH:1]Keep in mind that the increased Settler production comes from hammers, not food. This means you'll want to focus as much on mines as farms and pastures when improving tiles in the early game. Chopping and whipping contribute hammers, so those get multiplied by the trait as well--hence the attraction of Bronze Working and Mathematics.[PARAGRAPH:1]You can enhance the increased GG emergence further by building the Great Wall. In addition to keeping barbs away, that wonder also provides +100% Great General emergence from battles that take place within your cultural borders, resulting in a +200% GG boost with the trait when defending within your own territory. Masonry, therefore, and a source of stone are likely to be priorities when playing as a leader with this trait.[PARAGRAPH:1]The chief way to take advantage of the Imperialistic trait once the original period of REX is over is simple: war. War early and war often. It's the only way to generate Great Generals (and remember that battling barbs earns you XPs, but not points towards a Great General.) Great Generals are actually one of the most useful Great People in the game, even if they lack some of the uses of other GPs (such as lightbulbing technologies or starting a Golden Age). You can attach them to units to uber-promote them, put them in cities to provide additional XPs or boost unit production with a military academy. Just remember to prioritize Code of Laws and courthouses to keep your ever-expanding empire economically viable.[PARAGRAPH:1]Many players favour combining the first Great General with a unit and giving it the Medic I, II, and III promotions. This medic unit will heal your stacks faster, allowing them to return to the fray much sooner. You can also use a GG to give a unit the Leadership promotion, which creates synergy with the Imperialistic trait because the promotion results in double XPs for that unit from every battle it survives, and those double XPs are doubled again in their count towards your next Great General. You can also combine the GG with a Caravel to give it Flanking I, Navigation I, and Navigation II in order to practically guarantee winning the circumnavigation bonus.[PARAGRAPH:1]Since you're going after several Great Generals (and likely basing much of your strategy on their benefits), you'll want to snag the free one that you get from researching Fascism first. With all the warmongering you'll be doing, you're going to want to build Mount Rushmore and run Police State to alleviate some of the War Weariness anyway.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Well, for starters, there's no cheap building and no economic advantage. It seems logical that Imperialistic should have cheap courthouses, but Organized has those, and shifting them away would seriously weaken that trait. Perhaps jails would have been a good cheap building for Imperialistic. If Civ IV had useful forts, faster build times of those would have been logical for this trait as well.[PARAGRAPH:1]Instead of a cheap building, however, there's a cheap unit. But Imperialistic's boost to Settler builds comes from hammers, not food. This means you need to work at cross-purposes in the early game, building mines to ensure your Settler builds take advantage of the trait. If food also boosted the Setter's build time, this would be a much stronger trait.[PARAGRAPH:1]The biggest weakness of the trait, however, is that it locks you into a specific strategy. You don't have to play as a warmonger with the Aggressive trait; you could leverage it to build a strong army and military infrastructure (the cheap barracks and drydocks count towards your power rating, after all) so you're left alone to build. With Imperialistic, however, you have to warmonger. There's no other way to earn those Great Generals except by fighting other civs. Don't play with this trait unless you're in the mood to knock heads, or you're wasting it.
TEXT.Russian: 脧卯帽毛氓 铆氓帽锚卯毛眉锚猫玫 卯么么-毛脿茅铆卯芒没玫 猫茫冒 莽脿 脼毛猫每 脰氓莽脿冒每, 矛卯氓 卯貌铆卯酶氓铆猫氓 锚 氓茫卯 卯帽卯谩氓铆铆卯帽貌每矛 贸毛贸梅酶猫毛卯帽眉. 脽 猫帽玫卯盲铆卯 芒锚毛镁梅猫毛 氓茫卯 芒 锚脿貌氓茫卯冒猫镁 "帽毛脿谩没玫", 铆卯 帽氓茅梅脿帽 茂卯毛脿茫脿镁, 梅貌卯 卯铆 卯貌铆卯帽猫貌眉帽每 锚 "帽冒氓盲铆猫矛"--氓帽毛猫 卯铆 猫帽茂卯毛眉莽贸氓貌帽每 茂冒脿芒猫毛眉铆卯.[PARAGRAPH:1]脠矛茂氓冒猫脿毛猫帽貌 茂卯盲盲氓冒忙猫芒脿氓貌 脿茫冒氓帽帽猫芒铆卯氓 冒脿帽酶猫冒氓铆猫氓 盲芒贸矛每 帽茂卯帽卯谩脿矛猫. 脧冒氓忙盲氓 芒帽氓茫卯, 茂卯帽氓毛氓铆枚没 盲氓酶氓芒没 盲毛每 帽貌冒卯猫貌氓毛眉帽貌芒脿, 茂卯莽芒卯毛每每 芒脿矛 芒没茂卯毛铆猫貌眉 谩卯毛氓氓 谩没帽貌冒没茅 莽脿玫芒脿貌 莽氓矛毛猫 芒 铆脿梅脿毛氓 猫茫冒没. 脗貌卯冒卯氓, 猫帽茂卯毛眉莽贸茅貌氓 茂冒氓猫矛贸霉氓帽貌芒卯 贸芒氓毛猫梅氓铆铆卯茫卯 芒卯莽铆猫锚铆卯芒氓铆猫每 芒氓毛猫锚卯茫卯 茫氓铆氓冒脿毛脿, 芒没 茂卯卯霉冒每氓貌氓帽眉 冒脿帽酶猫冒每貌眉帽每 梅氓冒氓莽 脿茫冒氓帽帽猫镁.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧氓冒芒卯卯梅氓冒氓盲铆没氓 貌氓玫铆卯毛卯茫猫猫[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_BRONZE_WORKING]脕冒卯铆莽卯芒卯氓 毛猫貌眉氓[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASONRY]脢脿矛氓铆铆脿每 锚毛脿盲锚脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MATHEMATICS]脤脿貌氓矛脿貌猫锚脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CODE_OF_LAWS]脩芒卯盲 莽脿锚卯铆卯芒[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_FASCISM]脭脿酶猫莽矛[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]脗帽氓 芒卯氓铆铆没氓 貌氓玫铆卯毛卯茫猫猫[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧卯毛氓莽铆没氓 梅贸盲氓帽脿[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_GREAT_WALL_OF_CHINA]脗氓毛猫锚脿每 帽貌氓铆脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_MT_RUSHMORE]脙卯冒脿 脨脿酶矛卯冒[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脣贸梅酶猫氓 梅氓冒貌卯茅.[PARAGRAPH:1]脩脿矛脿每 谩卯毛眉酶脿每 帽毛脿谩卯帽貌眉 梅氓冒貌没, 卯盲铆脿锚卯, 媒貌卯 貌卯 梅貌卯 卯铆脿 莽脿茂猫冒脿氓貌 芒脿帽 芒 帽茂氓枚猫么猫梅氓帽锚贸镁 帽貌冒脿貌氓茫猫镁. 脗没 铆氓 盲卯毛忙铆没 猫茫冒脿貌眉 锚脿锚 矛猫毛猫貌脿冒猫帽貌 帽 卯帽卯谩氓铆铆卯帽貌每矛猫 脧卯毛锚卯芒卯盲枚脿; 芒没 矛卯茫毛猫 贸帽猫毛猫貌眉 媒貌卯, 梅貌卯谩没 茂卯帽貌冒卯猫貌眉 帽猫毛眉铆贸镁 脿冒矛猫镁 猫 芒卯氓铆铆贸镁 猫铆么冒脿帽貌冒贸锚貌贸冒贸 (盲氓酶氓芒没氓 谩脿冒脿锚猫 猫 帽贸玫猫氓 盲卯锚猫 冒脿帽帽梅猫貌没芒脿镁貌 芒脿酶贸 卯枚氓铆锚贸 矛卯霉猫, 芒 锚卯铆枚氓 锚卯铆枚卯芒) 貌脿锚猫矛 卯谩冒脿莽卯矛 芒没 卯帽貌脿芒毛氓铆没 芒 茂卯锚卯氓, 梅貌卯谩没 帽貌冒卯猫貌眉. 脩 脠矛茂氓冒猫脿毛猫帽貌猫梅氓帽锚猫矛, 卯盲铆脿锚卯, 芒没 茂卯毛贸梅脿氓貌氓 矛猫毛猫貌脿冒猫帽貌脿. 脥氓貌 铆猫锚脿锚卯茫卯 盲冒贸茫卯茫卯 帽茂卯帽卯谩脿 莽脿冒脿谩卯貌脿貌眉 脗氓毛猫锚猫玫 茫氓铆氓冒脿毛卯芒 锚冒卯矛氓 锚脿锚 谩卯冒每帽眉 帽 盲冒贸茫猫矛猫 枚猫芒猫毛猫莽脿枚猫每矛猫. 脥氓 猫茫冒脿茅貌氓 帽 媒貌卯茅 梅氓冒貌卯茅, 氓帽毛猫 芒没 铆氓 小褌褉芯懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯
小褌褉芯懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁芯 I

TEXT.English: If Aggressive is the warmonger's trait, Industrious is the builder's trait. Wonders are cheaper, enhancing their "ooo--shiny" appeal and giving you a leg up in the competitions to get them built. In addition, forges, a building that makes other buildings faster to build, is, well, faster to build.[PARAGRAPH:1]As of the Beyond the Sword expansion pack, this is now Civilization IV's most exclusive club, though not by much. All the other traits have 9 or 10 leaders who possess them, while Industrious is shared by only 8 leaders. And no, there's still no Industrious/Philosophical trait combination; it's obviously regarded by the game designers as overpowered.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASONRY]Masonry[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MONOTHEISM]Monotheism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_METAL_CASTING]Metal Casting[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]Assembly Line[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]Er... pretty much all of them. Well, maybe except for Chichen Itza.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FORGE]Forge[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FACTORY]Factory[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Civics[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_STATE_OWNED]State Property[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_CASTE_SYSTEM]Caste System[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_GREEN]Environmentalism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Build wonders, of course. Build them and leverage them and keep them out of the AI's grubby little hands. Also look for and claim the wonder-hurrying resources such as copper, iron, marble, and stone. Remember that the accelerated wonder production applies to the national wonders as well.[PARAGRAPH:1]Also, prioritize the Metal Casting tech in order to access your cheap building. A tactic with a great deal of synergy for Industrious leaders is to build the Oracle (a wonder, so it's cheaper) and select Metal Casting as your free technology. Then go build forges. Remember forges are also required for additional wonders like the Ironworks, the Colossus, the Eiffel Tower, and the Statue of Liberty. Since Metal Casting enables it, the Colossus is usually built right after its future city's forge is finished.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]When you're playing as an Industrious leader, the siren-like allure of being a "buildaholic" is even greater. Even though wonders are cheaper, they're still not dirt cheap. They require a considerable investment of hammers that could be put to better uses. As always, make sure the wonders you choose to build fit into your strategy and the circumstances of the game.
TEXT.Russian: 脜帽毛猫 脧卯毛锚卯芒卯盲氓枚 媒貌卯 卯帽卯谩氓铆铆卯帽貌眉 矛猫毛猫貌脿冒猫帽貌脿, 脮卯莽每茅帽貌芒氓铆铆猫锚 媒貌卯 卯帽卯谩氓铆铆卯帽貌眉 帽貌冒卯猫貌氓毛每. 脳贸盲氓帽脿 谩卯毛氓氓 盲氓酶氓芒没, 贸芒氓毛猫梅猫芒脿每 猫玫 "每帽铆贸镁" 茂冒猫貌每茫脿貌氓毛眉铆卯帽貌眉 猫 盲脿氓貌 芒脿矛 卯茂卯冒贸 芒 帽卯冒氓芒铆卯芒脿铆猫每玫 茂卯 猫玫 帽貌冒卯猫貌氓毛眉帽貌芒贸. 脢冒卯矛氓 貌卯茫卯, 锚贸莽铆猫枚脿, 莽盲脿铆猫氓, 锚卯貌卯冒卯氓 贸帽锚卯冒每氓貌 帽貌冒卯猫貌氓毛眉帽貌芒卯 盲冒贸茫猫玫 莽盲脿铆猫茅, 铆贸, 芒 卯谩霉氓矛, 谩没帽貌冒氓氓 帽貌冒卯猫貌眉.[PARAGRAPH:1]脳貌卯 锚脿帽脿氓貌帽每 茂脿锚氓貌脿 冒脿帽酶猫冒氓铆猫每 Beyond the Sword, 媒貌脿 帽氓茅梅脿帽 帽脿矛没茅 猫帽锚毛镁梅猫貌氓毛眉铆没茅 锚毛贸谩 Civilization IV, 玫卯貌每 铆氓 卯梅氓铆眉. 脗帽氓 盲冒贸茫猫氓 梅氓冒貌没 猫矛氓镁貌 9 猫毛猫 10 毛猫盲氓冒卯芒 锚貌卯 卯谩毛脿盲脿氓貌 猫矛猫, 芒 貌卯 芒冒氓矛每 锚脿锚 脮卯莽每茅帽貌芒氓铆铆猫锚 冒脿莽盲氓毛氓铆 貌卯毛眉锚卯 8 毛猫盲氓冒脿矛猫. 脠 铆氓貌, 卯铆 卯盲铆脿锚卯 铆氓 锚卯矛谩猫铆脿枚猫每 梅氓冒貌 脮卯莽每茅帽貌芒氓铆铆猫锚脿/脭猫毛卯帽卯么脿; 媒貌卯 卯梅氓芒猫盲铆卯 冒脿帽枚氓铆氓铆卯 茂冒卯氓锚貌猫冒卯芒霉猫锚脿矛猫 猫茫冒没 锚脿锚 茂卯盲脿芒毛氓铆猫氓.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧氓冒芒卯卯梅氓冒氓盲铆没氓 貌氓玫铆卯毛卯茫猫猫[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MASONRY]脢脿矛氓铆铆脿每 锚毛脿盲锚脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MONOTHEISM]脤卯铆卯貌氓猫莽矛[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_METAL_CASTING]脣猫貌眉氓[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]脢卯铆芒氓茅氓冒[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧卯毛氓莽铆没氓 梅贸盲氓帽脿[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET]脩锚卯冒氓氓 . . . 芒 莽铆脿梅猫貌氓毛眉铆卯茅 帽貌氓茂氓铆猫 芒帽氓 卯铆猫. 脮卯冒卯酶卯, 芒卯莽矛卯忙铆卯 莽脿 猫帽锚毛镁梅氓铆猫氓矛 脳猫梅氓铆-脠枚没.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脣贸梅酶猫氓 莽盲脿铆猫每[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FORGE]脢贸莽铆猫枚脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FACTORY]脭脿谩冒猫锚脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧卯毛氓莽铆没氓 茂脿冒脿盲猫茫矛没[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_STATE_OWNED]脙卯帽贸盲脿冒帽貌芒氓铆铆脿每 帽卯谩帽貌芒氓铆铆卯帽貌眉[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_CASTE_SYSTEM]脢脿帽貌卯芒脿每 帽猫帽貌氓矛脿[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_GREEN]脦玫冒脿铆脿 卯锚冒贸忙. 帽冒氓盲没[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脢脿锚 猫玫 猫帽茂卯毛眉莽卯芒脿貌眉[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]脩貌冒卯猫貌眉 梅贸盲氓帽脿, 锚卯铆氓梅铆卯. 脩貌冒卯茅貌氓 猫玫 猫 贸帽猫毛眉貌氓 猫玫 猫 铆氓 茂贸帽貌猫貌氓 猫玫 芒 铆氓冒每酶毛猫芒没氓 矛脿毛氓铆眉锚猫氓 冒贸锚猫 脠脠. 脪脿锚忙氓 猫霉猫貌氓 猫 茂冒氓貌氓铆盲贸茅貌氓 铆脿 梅贸盲氓帽卯贸帽锚卯冒每镁霉猫氓 冒氓帽贸冒帽没 貌猫茂脿 矛氓盲猫, 忙氓毛氓莽脿, 矛冒脿矛卯冒脿, 猫 锚脿矛铆每. 脧卯矛铆猫貌氓 梅貌卯 贸帽锚卯冒氓铆铆卯氓 茂冒卯猫莽芒卯盲帽貌芒卯 梅贸盲氓帽 芒毛猫每氓貌 铆脿 铆脿枚猫卯铆脿毛眉铆没氓 梅贸盲氓帽脿 貌脿锚忙氓.[PARAGRAPH:1]脪脿锚忙氓, 贸盲氓毛猫貌氓 茂冒猫卯冒猫貌氓貌 貌氓玫铆卯毛卯茫猫猫 脣猫貌眉每 芒 茂卯冒每盲锚氓 盲卯帽貌贸茂脿 锚 芒脿酶氓矛贸 盲氓酶氓芒卯矛贸 帽貌冒卯氓铆猫镁. 脪脿锚貌猫锚脿 帽 谩卯毛眉酶猫矛 锚卯毛猫梅氓帽貌芒卯矛 帽卯芒矛氓帽貌铆没玫 盲氓茅帽貌芒猫茅 帽 脠铆盲贸帽貌冒猫脿毛眉铆没矛猫 毛猫盲氓冒脿矛猫 媒貌卯 茂卯帽貌冒卯猫貌眉 脦冒脿锚贸毛脿 (梅贸盲卯, 茂卯媒貌卯矛贸 盲氓酶氓芒卯) 猫 芒没谩冒脿貌眉 脣猫貌眉氓 锚脿锚 芒脿酶贸 帽芒卯谩卯盲铆贸镁 貌氓玫铆卯毛卯茫猫镁. 脟脿貌氓矛 铆脿梅猫铆脿茅貌氓 帽貌冒卯猫貌眉 锚贸莽铆猫枚没. 脧卯矛铆猫貌氓 梅貌卯 锚贸莽铆猫枚脿, 貌脿锚忙氓 貌冒氓谩贸氓貌帽每 盲毛每 盲卯茂卯毛铆猫貌氓毛眉铆没玫 梅贸盲氓帽 锚脿锚 脤氓貌脿毛毛贸冒茫猫梅氓帽锚猫茅 莽脿芒卯盲, 脢卯毛卯帽帽, 脻茅么氓毛氓芒脿 谩脿酶铆每, 猫 脩貌脿貌贸每 帽芒卯谩卯盲没. 脪脿锚 锚脿锚 脣猫貌眉氓 芒锚毛镁梅脿氓貌 猫玫, 脢卯毛卯帽帽 卯谩没梅铆卯 帽貌冒卯猫貌帽每 帽冒脿莽贸 茂卯帽毛氓 貌卯茫卯 锚脿锚 芒 氓茫卯 谩贸盲贸霉氓矛 茫卯冒卯盲氓 锚贸莽铆猫枚脿 莽脿锚脿铆梅猫芒脿氓貌帽每.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]脧毛卯玫脿每 帽貌卯冒卯铆脿[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]脢卯茫盲脿 芒没 猫茫冒脿氓貌氓 锚脿锚 毛猫盲氓冒 脮卯莽每茅帽貌芒氓铆铆猫锚, 帽猫冒氓铆卯-茂卯盲卯谩铆卯氓 卯梅脿冒卯芒脿铆猫氓 谩没貌眉 "帽貌冒卯猫貌氓毛眉铆卯茫卯毛猫锚卯矛" 氓霉氓 贸芒氓毛猫梅猫芒脿氓貌帽每. 脛脿忙氓 茂冒猫 貌卯矛, 梅貌卯 梅贸盲氓帽脿 谩卯毛氓氓 盲氓酶氓芒没, 卯铆猫 芒帽氓 氓霉氓 铆氓 盲氓酶氓芒脿每 茫冒每莽眉. 脦铆猫 貌冒氓谩贸镁貌 莽铆脿梅猫貌氓毛眉铆没玫 猫铆芒氓帽貌猫枚猫茅 矛卯毛卯貌锚卯芒, 锚卯貌卯冒没氓 矛卯茫毛猫 谩没 谩没貌眉 茂卯矛氓霉氓铆没 芒 毛贸梅酶猫氓 枚氓毛猫. 脢脿锚 芒帽氓茫盲脿, 贸盲卯帽貌卯芒氓冒眉貌氓帽眉 梅貌卯 梅贸盲氓帽脿, 锚卯貌卯冒没氓 芒没 玫卯貌猫貌氓 帽貌冒卯猫貌眉, 芒茂猫帽没芒脿镁貌帽每 芒 芒脿酶贸 帽貌冒脿貌氓茫猫镁 猫 卯谩帽貌卯每貌氓毛眉帽貌芒脿 猫茫冒没.

TEXT.English: This leader believes in completely self-reliant state to the point where he is ready to cut off most connections to the outside world. - TR Team.
TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant croit en un 脡tat compl猫tement autosuffisant au point o霉 il est pr锚t 脿 couper la plupart des connexions avec le monde ext茅rieur. - 脡quipe TR.

TEXT.English: Nothing less than the whole world will satisfy this man. He already sees himself as the world's greatest ruler, and demands that every project to immortalize his glory be accordingly grandiose. Or maybe he is just compensating for something? - TR Team.
TEXT.French: Rien de moins que le monde entier ne satisfera cet homme. Il se voit d茅j脿 comme le plus grand dirigeant du monde et exige que chaque projet visant 脿 immortaliser sa gloire soit grandiose en cons茅quence. Ou peut-锚tre compense-t-il simplement quelque chose ? - 脡quipe TR.
TEXT.Russian: 袧懈褔褌芯 屑械薪褜褕械械, 褔械屑 胁械褋褜 屑懈褉, 薪械 褍写芯胁谢械褌胁芯褉懈褌 褌褖械褋谢邪胁懈械 褝褌芯谐芯 褔械谢芯胁械泻邪. 袨薪 褍卸械 褋褔懈褌邪械褌 褋械斜褟 胁械谢懈褔邪泄褕懈屑 锌褉邪胁懈褌械谢械屑 屑懈褉邪 懈 褌褉械斜褍械褌, 褔褌芯斜褘 泻邪卸写褘泄 锌褉芯械泻褌 锌芯 褍胁械泻芯胁械褔懈胁邪薪懈褞 械谐芯 褋谢邪胁褘 斜褘谢 褋芯芯褌胁械褌褋褌胁械薪薪芯 谐褉邪薪写懈芯蟹薪褘屑. 袠谢懈 屑芯卸械褌 芯薪 锌褉芯褋褌芯 褔褌芯-褌芯 泻芯屑锌械薪褋懈褉褍械褌?
袦谐谢.
袣芯褔械胁薪懈褔械褋褌胁芯
袣芯褔械胁薪懈褔械褋褌胁芯 I

TEXT.French: Ce dirigeant n'aime pas 锚tre s茅dentaire
TEXT.Russian: 孝邪泻懈械 谢懈写械褉褘 薪械 谢褞斜褟褌 卸懈褌褜 薪邪 芯写薪芯屑 屑械褋褌械.
袣褔胁.
袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯褋褌褜
袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯褋褌褜 I

TEXT.English: Although Organized has a direct economic benefit--reducing the overhead of civics--it isn't nearly as big a boost in that regard as Financial. Nevertheless, saved GPT is saved GPT and is nothing to sneeze at.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]High-Priority Technologies[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MONOTHEISM]Monotheism[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CODE_OF_LAWS]Code of Laws[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_SAILING]Sailing[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]Assembly Line[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Wonders[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_GREAT_LIGHTHOUSE]The Great Lighthouse[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FORBIDDEN_PALACE]The Forbidden Palace[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_CRISTO_REDENTOR]Cristo Redentor[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Best Buildings[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_COURTHOUSE]Courthouse[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LIGHTHOUSE]Lighthouse[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FACTORY]Factory[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]Useful Civics[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_BUREAUCRACY]Bureaucracy[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_STATE_OWNED]State Property[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]How to Use It[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Similar to Spiritual, technologies that enable civics--especially higher cost civics--are priorities. Unlike Spiritual, however, switching civics is not something to do constantly (unless you're Asoka, who has the best of both worlds in this regard). Also remember to choose a civic because you'll benefit from it, not just because it's available or because Organized will make it cheaper.[PARAGRAPH:1]The big benefits from Organized, however, are the cheap buildings--three of the best in the game. To leverage the lighthouses, try to build several coastal cities. Cheap courthouses make new cities cheaper, so you can employ this into a REX strategy or into warmongering or both.[PARAGRAPH:1]In fact, I tend to consider Organized to be a warmonger's trait (especially for Hammurabi, Julius Caesar, and Napoleon, whose companion traits are also warmonger-friendly). This is because my first build in a conquered city is a courthouse to reduce its maintenance cost, and Organized makes those courthouses cheaper to build--or whip.[PARAGRAPH:1]Finally, factories are one of the best late-game buildings, and the 2.08 patch has made them cheap for Organized.[PARAGRAPH:1]Technology priorities are obviously Sailing, Code of Laws, and Assembly Line for the cheap buildings. Other tech targets are those that enable some of the more useful but expensive civics, especially Civil Service for the powerful Bureaucracy civic. Its high upkeep cost will be cut in half for an Organized leader, increasing its utility. The same goes for Organized Religion (enabled by Monotheism) and Police State (enabled by Fascism).[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]The Downside[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]Like many traits, as the game progresses, Organized gets weaker. Your economy grows and high-upkeep civics gradually become more affordable. As a result, the addition of a late cheap building (factories) in the 2.08 patch was a welcome late-game boost to Organized. Nevertheless, the best period for Organized is definitely the mid-game when you're probably running Bureaucracy and Organized Religion and are still building your economy.
TEXT.Russian: 啸芯褌褟 褍 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯谐芯 谢懈写械褉邪 械褋褌褜 锌褉褟屑邪褟 褝泻芯薪芯屑懈褔械褋泻邪褟 胁褘谐芯写邪 - 褋芯泻褉邪褖械薪懈械 薪邪泻谢邪写薪褘褏 褉邪褋褏芯写芯胁 薪邪 芯斜褋谢褍卸懈胁邪薪懈械 锌邪褉邪写懈谐屑 - 褝褌芯 褋褌芯谢褜 褋懈谢褜薪芯械 锌褉械懈屑褍褖械褋褌胁芯, 泻邪泻 褎懈薪邪薪褋芯胁褘械 胁褘谐芯写褘.[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袩褉懈芯褉懈褌械褌薪褘械 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈懈[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_MONOTHEISM]袝写懈薪芯斜芯卸懈械[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_CODE_OF_LAWS]小胁芯写 蟹邪泻芯薪芯胁[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_SAILING]袩邪褉褍褋薪芯械 芯褋薪邪褖械薪懈械[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=TECH_ASSEMBLY_LINE]小斜芯褉芯褔薪邪褟 谢懈薪懈褟[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袩芯谢械蟹薪褘械 效褍写械褋邪[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_THE_GREAT_LIGHTHOUSE]袙械谢懈泻懈泄 袦邪褟泻[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FORBIDDEN_PALACE]袟邪锌褉械褌薪褘泄 写胁芯褉械褑[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_CRISTO_REDENTOR]袣褉懈褋褌芯 袪械写械薪褌芯褉[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袥褍褔褕懈械 袟写邪薪懈褟[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_COURTHOUSE]袟写邪薪懈械 褋褍写邪[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_LIGHTHOUSE]袦邪褟泻[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=BUILDING_FACTORY]肖邪斜褉懈泻邪[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袩芯谢械蟹薪褘械 锌邪褉邪写懈谐屑褘[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_BUREAUCRACY]袘褞褉芯泻褉邪褌懈褟[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][ICON_BULLET][LINK=CIVIC_STATE_OWNED]袚芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪邪褟 褋芯斜褋褌胁械薪薪芯褋褌褜[\LINK][PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袣邪泻 褝褌芯 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌褜?[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]袩芯写芯斜薪芯 芦袛褍褏芯胁薪褘屑禄 泻邪褔械褋褌胁邪屑, 褌械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈懈, 芯斜械褋锌械褔懈胁邪褞褖懈械 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻芯械 锌褉邪胁芯, 芯褋芯斜械薪薪芯 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻懈械, 褋 斜芯谢械械 胁褘褋芯泻懈屑懈 蟹邪褌褉邪褌邪屑懈, 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 锌褉懈芯褉懈褌械褌薪褘屑懈 写谢褟 褌邪泻芯谐芯 褌懈锌邪 谢懈写械褉芯胁. 袨写薪邪泻芯, 胁 芯褌谢懈褔懈械 芯褌 袛褍褏芯胁薪芯谐芯 谢懈写械褉邪, 锌械褉械泻谢褞褔械薪懈械 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻懈褏 薪邪胁褘泻芯胁 薪械 褟胁谢褟械褌褋褟 褔械屑-褌芯 锌芯褋褌芯褟薪薪褘屑 (械褋谢懈 褌芯谢褜泻芯 胁褘 薪械 褑邪褉褜 袗褕芯泻邪, 褍 泻芯褌芯褉芯谐芯 胁 褝褌芯屑 芯褌薪芯褕械薪懈懈 械褋褌褜 谢褍褔褕械械 懈蟹 芯斜械懈褏 泻邪褔械褋褌胁). 孝邪泻卸械 薪械 蟹邪斜褍写褜褌械 胁褘斜懈褉邪褌褜 褋芯芯褌胁械褌褋褌胁褍褞褖懈械 锌邪褉邪写懈谐屑褘 褋芯芯斜褉邪蟹薪芯 懈褏 锌芯谢褜蟹械, 邪 薪械 褌芯谢褜泻芯 锌芯褌芯屑褍, 褔褌芯 芯薪懈 谢械谐泻芯 写芯褋褌褍锌薪褘 懈谢懈 锌芯褌芯屑褍 褔褌芯 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘泄 谢懈写械褉 褋写械谢邪械褌 懈褏 写械褕械胁谢械.[PARAGRAPH:1]袨写薪邪泻芯 薪邪懈斜芯谢褜褕懈械 锌褉械懈屑褍褖械褋褌胁邪 褍 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘褏 谢懈写械褉芯胁 - 褝褌芯 写械褕械胁褘械 蟹写邪薪懈褟, 褌褉懈 懈蟹 谢褍褔褕懈褏 胁 懈谐褉械. 效褌芯斜褘 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌褜 屑邪褟泻懈, 锌芯褋褌邪褉邪泄褌械褋褜 锌芯褋褌褉芯懈褌褜 薪械褋泻芯谢褜泻芯 锌褉懈斜褉械卸薪褘褏 谐芯褉芯写芯胁. 袛械褕械胁褘械 蟹写邪薪懈褟 褋褍写邪 写械谢邪褞褌 薪芯胁褘械 谐芯褉芯写邪 写械褕械胁谢械, 褌邪泻 褔褌芯 胁褘 屑芯卸械褌械 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌褜 褝褌芯 胁 褋褌褉邪褌械谐懈懈 REX 懈谢懈 胁 胁芯泄薪械 懈谢懈 胁 芯斜芯懈褏.[PARAGRAPH:1]肖邪泻褌懈褔械褋泻懈, 褟 褋泻谢芯薪械薪 褉邪褋褑械薪懈胁邪褌褜 泻邪褔械褋褌胁芯 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘泄 懈写械邪谢褜薪芯泄 写谢褟 锌芯写卸懈谐邪褌械谢械泄 胁芯泄薪褘 (芯褋芯斜械薪薪芯 写谢褟 啸邪屑屑褍褉邪锌懈, 挟谢懈褟 笑械蟹邪褉褟 懈 袧邪锌芯谢械芯薪邪, 褔褜懈 褋芯锌褍褌褋褌胁褍褞褖懈械 泻邪褔械褋褌胁邪 褌邪泻卸械 锌芯写褏芯写褟褌 写谢褟 锌褉芯胁芯褑懈褉芯胁邪薪懈褟 胁芯泄薪褘). 袩芯褝褌芯屑褍 屑芯褟 锌械褉胁邪褟 锌芯褋褌褉芯泄泻邪 胁 蟹邪胁芯械胁邪薪薪芯屑 谐芯褉芯写械 - 褝褌芯 蟹写邪薪懈械 褋褍写邪, 褔褌芯斜褘 褍屑械薪褜褕懈褌褜 褉邪褋褏芯写褘 薪邪 械谐芯 芯斜褋谢褍卸懈胁邪薪懈械, 懈 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘泄 谢懈写械褉 写械谢邪械褌 褝褌懈 蟹写邪薪懈褟 写械褕械胁谢械 胁 褋褌褉芯懈褌械谢褜褋褌胁械 懈谢懈 锌褉懈 褍褋泻芯褉械薪懈懈 锌褉芯懈蟹胁芯写褋褌胁邪.[PARAGRAPH:1]袧邪泻芯薪械褑, 褎邪斜褉懈泻懈 - 芯写薪芯 懈蟹 谢褍褔褕懈褏 蟹写邪薪懈泄 锌芯蟹写薪械泄 懈谐褉褘, 懈 锌邪褌褔 2.08 褋写械谢邪谢 懈褏 写械褕械胁褘屑懈 写谢褟 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘褏 谢懈写械褉芯胁.[PARAGRAPH:1]孝械褏薪芯谢芯谐懈褔械褋泻懈械 锌褉懈芯褉懈褌械褌褘 - 褝褌芯 袩邪褉褍褋薪褘泄 褋锌芯褉褌, 小胁芯写 蟹邪泻芯薪芯胁 懈 小斜芯褉芯褔薪褘泄 泻芯薪胁械泄械褉 写谢褟 写械褕械胁褘褏 蟹写邪薪懈泄. 袛褉褍谐懈屑懈 褌械褏薪懈褔械褋泻懈屑懈 褑械谢褟屑懈 褟胁谢褟褞褌褋褟 褌械, 泻芯褌芯褉褘械 锌芯蟹胁芯谢褟褞褌 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹芯胁邪褌褜 薪械泻芯褌芯褉褘械 懈蟹 斜芯谢械械 锌芯谢械蟹薪褘褏, 薪芯 写芯褉芯谐懈褏 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻懈褏 锌褉邪胁, 芯褋芯斜械薪薪芯 谐芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁械薪薪褍褞 褋谢褍卸斜褍 写谢褟 胁谢懈褟褌械谢褜薪芯泄 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻芯泄 斜褞褉芯泻褉邪褌懈懈. 袝谐芯 胁褘褋芯泻邪褟 褋褌芯懈屑芯褋褌褜 芯斜褋谢褍卸懈胁邪薪懈褟 斜褍写械褌 褋芯泻褉邪褖械薪邪 胁写胁芯械 写谢褟 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯谐芯 谢懈写械褉邪, 褔褌芯 褍胁械谢懈褔懈褌 械谐芯 锌芯谢械蟹薪芯褋褌褜. 孝芯 卸械 褋邪屑芯械 泻邪褋邪械褌褋褟 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯泄 袪械谢懈谐懈懈 (胁泻谢褞褔械薪薪芯泄 袦芯薪芯褌械懈蟹屑芯屑) 懈 袩芯谢懈褑械泄褋泻芯谐芯 袚芯褋褍写邪褉褋褌胁邪 (胁泻谢褞褔械薪薪芯泄 肖邪褕懈蟹屑芯屑).[PARAGRAPH:1][H1]袨斜褉邪褌薪邪褟 褋褌芯褉芯薪邪[\H1][PARAGRAPH:1]袣邪泻 懈 屑薪芯谐懈械 泻邪褔械褋褌胁邪, 锌芯 褏芯写褍 懈谐褉褘, 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘泄 褋褌邪薪芯胁懈褌褋褟 褋谢邪斜械械. 袙邪褕邪 褝泻芯薪芯屑懈泻邪 褉邪褋褌械褌, 懈 谐褉邪卸写邪薪褋泻芯械 薪邪褋械谢械薪懈械 褋 胁褘褋芯泻懈屑 褍褉芯胁薪械屑 褋芯写械褉卸邪薪懈褟 锌芯褋褌械锌械薪薪芯 褋褌邪薪芯胁懈褌褋褟 斜芯谢械械 写芯褋褌褍锌薪褘屑. 袙 褉械蟹褍谢褜褌邪褌械, 写芯斜邪胁谢械薪懈械 锌芯蟹写薪械谐芯 写械褕械胁芯谐芯 蟹写邪薪懈褟 (褎邪斜褉懈泻懈) 胁 锌邪褌褔 2.08 褋褌邪谢芯 写芯谢谐芯卸写邪薪薪褘屑 写芯锌芯谢薪械薪懈械屑 锌芯蟹写薪械泄 懈谐褉褘 写谢褟 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褘泄. 孝械屑 薪械 屑械薪械械, 谢褍褔褕懈泄 锌械褉懈芯写 写谢褟 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪芯谐芯 - 褝褌芯 芯锌褉械写械谢械薪薪芯 褋械褉械写懈薪邪 懈谐褉褘, 泻芯谐写邪 胁褘, 胁械褉芯褟褌薪芯, 懈褋锌芯谢褜蟹褍械褌械 斜褞褉芯泻褉邪褌懈褞 懈 袨褉谐邪薪懈蟹芯胁邪薪薪褍褞 褉械谢懈谐懈褞 懈 胁褋械 械褖械 褋褌褉芯懈褌械 褋胁芯褞 褝泻芯薪芯屑懈泻褍.
